
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8"/>
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width,initial-scale=1"/>
<title>Humanly · Understanding ourselves, scientifically</title>
<link rel="icon" href="data:image/png;base64,">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
<link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cormorant+Garamond:wght@500;600;700&family=Inter:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Space+Mono:wght@400;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
/* ============ TOKENS ============ */
:root{
  --paper:#FFF8F2; --paper2:#F3ECF4; --card:#FFFFFF;
  --ink:#324A6D; --ink-soft:#5E6E88; --ink-faint:#9BA6BA;
  --violet:#7B6FD4; --violet-soft:#ECE9FB;
  --coral:#DD8468; --coral-soft:#FBE7DD;
  --teal:#6E97C6; --teal-soft:#E4EDF7;
  --amber:#D7A24C; --amber-soft:#FBEFD7;
  --green:#6FA67B; --green-soft:#E4F0E6;
  --line:#E7E0E9; --shadow:0 1px 2px rgba(50,74,109,.04),0 22px 48px -28px rgba(50,74,109,.28);
  --shadow-sm:0 1px 2px rgba(50,74,109,.05);
  --r:14px; --r-sm:9px;
  --disp:'Cormorant Garamond',Georgia,serif;
  --body:'Inter',system-ui,sans-serif;
  --mono:'Space Mono',monospace;
}
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0;}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth;}
body{
  font-family:var(--body);background:var(--paper);color:var(--ink);
  line-height:1.65;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;overflow-x:hidden;
}
body::before{ /* ambient neural glow */
  content:"";position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:-1;pointer-events:none;
  background:
    radial-gradient(60% 50% at 12% 8%,rgba(201,195,245,.30),transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(55% 45% at 92% 4%,rgba(246,210,196,.26),transparent 60%),
    radial-gradient(60% 60% at 85% 95%,rgba(175,203,232,.24),transparent 60%);
}
::selection{background:var(--violet-soft);color:var(--ink);}
a{color:inherit;text-decoration:none;}
button{font-family:inherit;cursor:pointer;border:none;background:none;color:inherit;}
img{max-width:100%;}
a:focus-visible,button:focus-visible{outline:2px solid var(--violet);outline-offset:3px;border-radius:4px;}
@media(prefers-reduced-motion:reduce){*,*::before,*::after{animation-duration:.001ms!important;animation-iteration-count:1!important;transition-duration:.001ms!important;scroll-behavior:auto!important;}}

/* ============ TYPE HELPERS ============ */
.eyebrow{font-family:var(--body);font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;}
h1,h2,h3,h4{font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:700;line-height:1.08;letter-spacing:-.018em;-webkit-font-smoothing:antialiased;}
.mono{font-family:var(--mono);}

/* ============ TOP HUD ============ */
#hud{
  position:sticky;top:0;z-index:50;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:18px;
  padding:12px 22px;background:rgba(255,248,242,.84);backdrop-filter:blur(16px);
  border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);
}
.brand{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:11px;cursor:pointer;flex-shrink:0;}
.brand-mark{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;object-fit:cover;flex-shrink:0;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 1px var(--line),0 4px 14px -6px rgba(50,74,109,.40);}
@keyframes spin{to{transform:rotate(360deg);}}
.brand-name{font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:700;font-size:21px;letter-spacing:0;}
.brand-name b{color:var(--ink);font-style:italic;font-weight:600;}
.brand-tag{font-family:var(--body);font-size:10px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink-faint);display:block;margin-top:1px;}

.nav{display:flex;gap:4px;margin-left:8px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.nav button{font-size:13.5px;font-weight:600;padding:8px 14px;border-radius:11px;color:var(--ink-soft);transition:.18s;}
.nav button:hover{background:var(--paper2);color:var(--ink);}
.nav button.active{background:var(--ink);color:#fff;}

.hud-right{margin-left:auto;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:14px;}
.streak-pill{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:6px;font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;font-size:13px;
  background:var(--amber-soft);color:#9A6A2E;padding:7px 12px;border-radius:30px;}
.streak-pill .flame{font-size:14px;}
.xp-wrap{min-width:190px;}
.xp-top{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:baseline;margin-bottom:4px;}
.xp-rank{font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:700;font-size:13px;}
.xp-num{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-soft);}
.xp-track{height:9px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--paper2);overflow:hidden;box-shadow:inset 0 1px 2px rgba(0,0,0,.06);}
.xp-fill{height:100%;border-radius:6px;background:var(--violet);width:0;
  transition:width .8s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);}
.avatar{width:40px;height:40px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--ink);color:#fff;font-family:var(--disp);
  font-weight:700;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:17px;flex-shrink:0;}

@media(max-width:880px){
  .brand-name{font-size:16px;}.brand-tag{display:none;}
  #hud{gap:10px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
  .nav{order:5;width:100%;margin-left:0;overflow-x:auto;padding:6px 0 2px;-webkit-overflow-scrolling:touch;
    scrollbar-width:none;border-top:1px solid var(--line);}
  .nav::-webkit-scrollbar{display:none;}
  .nav button{white-space:nowrap;flex:0 0 auto;}
  .xp-wrap{min-width:120px;}.hud-right{order:4;}
}

/* ============ VIEW SYSTEM ============ */
.view{display:none;animation:fade .4s ease;}
.view.on{display:block;}
@keyframes fade{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(8px);}to{opacity:1;transform:none;}}
.wrap{max-width:1140px;margin:0 auto;padding:0 22px;}

/* ============ HERO ============ */
#v-home{padding-bottom:90px;}
.hero{position:relative;padding:88px 0 52px;overflow:hidden;}
.hero-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.05fr .95fr;gap:48px;align-items:center;}
.hero-eyebrow{color:var(--violet);margin-bottom:18px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.hero-eyebrow::before{content:"";width:30px;height:2px;background:var(--violet);display:inline-block;}
.hero h1{font-size:clamp(42px,6.4vw,82px);margin-bottom:22px;letter-spacing:-.025em;line-height:1.04;}
.hero h1 .ink{color:var(--ink);} .hero h1 .grad{font-style:italic;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink);}
.hero-lead{font-size:18px;color:var(--ink-soft);max-width:480px;margin-bottom:30px;}
.hero-cta{display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.btn{font-family:var(--body);font-weight:600;font-size:15px;padding:14px 26px;border-radius:11px;transition:.2s;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:9px;}
.btn-primary{background:var(--ink);color:#fff;box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.btn-primary:hover{transform:translateY(-2px);box-shadow:0 16px 38px -12px rgba(50,74,109,.36);}
.btn-ghost{background:#fff;color:var(--ink);border:1.5px solid var(--line);}
.btn-ghost:hover{border-color:var(--violet);color:var(--violet);}
.hero-stats{display:flex;gap:26px;margin-top:38px;}
.hstat .n{font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:700;font-size:30px;line-height:1;}
.hstat .l{font-family:var(--body);font-size:11px;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-top:6px;}
.hstat .n{color:var(--ink);}

/* hero neuron animation */
.hero-art{position:relative;height:420px;border-radius:28px;overflow:hidden;
  background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 38%,#FFFFFF,#F3ECF4);
  box-shadow:var(--shadow);border:1px solid var(--line);}
.hero-art canvas{position:absolute;inset:0;}
.hero-art-cap{position:absolute;left:18px;bottom:16px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.14em;
  text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink-faint);}
.hero-art-cap b{color:var(--ink);}
@media(max-width:840px){.hero-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:28px;}.hero-art{height:300px;}}

/* ============ SECTION SHELL ============ */
.sec{padding:72px 0;}
.sec-head{margin-bottom:42px;max-width:680px;}
.sec-head .eyebrow{color:var(--violet);margin-bottom:12px;}
.sec-head h2{font-size:clamp(30px,4.2vw,46px);margin-bottom:14px;letter-spacing:-.02em;}
.sec-head p{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:16px;}

/* ============ QUEST PATHWAY (signature) ============ */
.path-wrap{position:relative;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:20px;
  padding:40px 30px 30px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);overflow:hidden;}
.path-svg{position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;pointer-events:none;}
.quest-row{position:relative;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:18px;z-index:2;}
.qcard{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r);
  padding:22px 20px;cursor:pointer;transition:.22s;position:relative;}
.qcard:hover{transform:translateY(-3px);border-color:var(--violet);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.qnode{width:54px;height:54px;border-radius:16px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:24px;margin-bottom:14px;
  background:var(--violet-soft);border:1.5px solid var(--violet);transition:.3s;}
.qcard[data-done="1"] .qnode{background:var(--green);border-color:var(--green);color:#fff;box-shadow:0 0 0 6px var(--green-soft);}
.q-n{font-family:var(--body);font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-bottom:5px;}
.q-t{font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:700;font-size:17px;margin-bottom:7px;line-height:1.12;}
.q-mission{font-size:12.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);}
.q-mission b{color:var(--ink);font-weight:600;}
.q-badge{position:absolute;top:14px;right:14px;font-size:10px;font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;
  color:var(--green);display:none;}
.qcard[data-done="1"] .q-badge{display:block;}
@media(max-width:780px){.quest-row{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}}
@media(max-width:460px){.quest-row{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}

/* ============ OUTCOMES / TOPIC CHIPS ============ */
.split{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:24px;margin-top:30px;}
@media(max-width:760px){.split{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
.panel{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r);padding:26px 26px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}
.panel h3{font-size:20px;margin-bottom:16px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px;}
.panel h3 .dot{width:10px;height:10px;border-radius:50%;}
.olist{list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:12px;}
.olist li{display:flex;gap:11px;font-size:14.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);}
.olist li b{color:var(--ink);font-weight:600;}
.olist .ck{width:22px;height:22px;border-radius:7px;background:var(--violet-soft);color:var(--violet);
  display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:12px;flex-shrink:0;font-weight:700;}
.tchips{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;}
.tchip{font-family:var(--body);font-size:12px;font-weight:500;padding:7px 13px;border-radius:8px;
  background:#fff;color:var(--ink-soft);border:1px solid var(--line);}

/* ============ LESSON GRID ============ */
.lgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(255px,1fr));gap:18px;}
.lesson-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r);padding:22px;cursor:pointer;
  transition:.22s;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.lesson-card::before{content:"";position:absolute;left:0;top:0;bottom:0;width:3px;background:var(--c,var(--violet));}
.lesson-card:hover{transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.lc-num{font-family:var(--body);font-size:11px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-bottom:9px;}
.lc-title{font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:700;font-size:19px;margin-bottom:8px;line-height:1.12;}
.lc-sub{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-bottom:16px;min-height:42px;}
.lc-foot{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;}
.lc-xp{color:var(--amber);font-weight:700;}
.lc-status{color:var(--ink-faint);}
.lesson-card[data-done="1"] .lc-status{color:var(--green);font-weight:700;}

/* ============ LESSON READER ============ */
#v-lesson .wrap{max-width:820px;}
.reader-top{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin:10px 0 26px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.back-btn{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;font-weight:600;font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-soft);
  padding:9px 15px;border-radius:11px;background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);transition:.18s;}
.back-btn:hover{color:var(--violet);border-color:var(--violet);}
.reader-eyebrow{color:var(--violet);}
.reader h1{font-size:clamp(30px,5vw,46px);margin:6px 0 16px;}
.reader-lead{font-size:19px;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-bottom:32px;padding-bottom:28px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);line-height:1.6;}
.reader h2{font-size:26px;margin:38px 0 14px;}
.reader h3{font-size:20px;margin:28px 0 10px;color:var(--ink);}
.reader p{font-size:16.5px;color:#43506A;margin-bottom:17px;line-height:1.75;}
.reader p b,.reader li b{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700;}
.reader ul{margin:0 0 18px;padding-left:4px;list-style:none;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:9px;}
.reader ul li{display:flex;gap:11px;font-size:15.5px;color:#43506A;}
.reader ul li::before{content:"";width:6px;height:6px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--violet);margin-top:10px;flex-shrink:0;}
.callout{border-radius:var(--r);padding:20px 22px;margin:24px 0;border:1px solid;}
.callout .ct{font-family:var(--body);font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;margin-bottom:8px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.callout p{margin:0;font-size:15px;}
.callout.case{background:var(--coral-soft);border-color:#ffc9da;} .callout.case .ct{color:var(--coral);}
.callout.key{background:var(--violet-soft);border-color:#dfd5fc;} .callout.key .ct{color:var(--violet);}
.callout.clin{background:var(--teal-soft);border-color:#bfeef2;} .callout.clin .ct{color:#0c8d99;}
.dtable{width:100%;border-collapse:collapse;margin:18px 0;font-size:14.5px;border-radius:var(--r-sm);overflow:hidden;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}
.dtable th{background:var(--ink);color:#fff;text-align:left;padding:12px 16px;font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:700;font-size:13.5px;}
.dtable td{padding:11px 16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);background:#fff;}
.dtable tr:last-child td{border-bottom:none;}
.dtable td:first-child{font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);}
.reader-foot{margin-top:48px;padding-top:28px;border-top:1px solid var(--line);display:flex;gap:12px;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;}
/* figures / diagrams */
.fig{margin:30px 0;background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;padding:22px 24px 16px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}
.fig-label{font-family:var(--body);font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--violet);margin-bottom:12px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:8px;}
.fig-label::before{content:"";width:18px;height:2px;background:var(--violet);}
.fig svg{width:100%;height:auto;display:block;}
.figcap{font-family:var(--body);font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-soft);line-height:1.5;margin-top:14px;padding-top:12px;border-top:1px dashed var(--line);}
.figcap b{color:var(--ink);font-weight:700;}
.reader h2 .num{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-faint);font-weight:700;margin-right:8px;}
.deepbox{background:var(--paper2);border-radius:14px;padding:18px 20px;margin:22px 0;border:1px solid var(--line);}
.deepbox .dt{font-family:var(--body);font-size:10.5px;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-bottom:8px;}
.deepbox p{margin-bottom:0;font-size:14.5px;}
.termgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:10px;margin:20px 0;}
@media(max-width:600px){.termgrid{grid-template-columns:1fr;}}
.term{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:12px;padding:13px 15px;}
.term .tn{font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:700;font-size:15px;margin-bottom:3px;}
.term .td{font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-soft);}

/* ============ MISSIONS ============ */
.mgrid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(270px,1fr));gap:20px;}
.mission-card{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r);overflow:hidden;
  transition:.22s;cursor:pointer;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
.mission-card:hover{transform:translateY(-5px);box-shadow:var(--shadow);}
.mc-top{height:120px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:44px;position:relative;}
.mc-top svg{width:48px;height:48px;}
.qnode svg{width:27px;height:27px;}
.mc-body{padding:20px 22px;flex:1;display:flex;flex-direction:column;}
.mc-title{font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:700;font-size:20px;margin-bottom:7px;}
.mc-desc{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);flex:1;margin-bottom:14px;}
.mc-foot{display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;}
.mc-go{font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:var(--violet);}
.mc-done{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;font-weight:700;color:var(--green);display:none;}
.mission-card[data-done="1"] .mc-done{display:block;}

/* generic mission stage */
.stage{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:18px;padding:32px;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}
.stage-head{display:flex;align-items:flex-start;justify-content:space-between;gap:16px;margin-bottom:22px;flex-wrap:wrap;}
.stage-head h2{font-size:28px;}
.stage-head p{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:15px;margin-top:6px;max-width:560px;}

/* ============ TOAST / BADGE POP ============ */
#toasts{position:fixed;right:22px;bottom:22px;z-index:200;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:10px;}
.toast{background:var(--ink);color:#fff;border-radius:14px;padding:14px 18px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);
  display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;animation:tin .35s cubic-bezier(.2,1.4,.4,1);max-width:320px;}
@keyframes tin{from{transform:translateX(120%);opacity:0;}to{transform:none;opacity:1;}}
.toast .ti{font-size:24px;}
.toast .tt{font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:700;font-size:14px;}
.toast .ts{font-size:12.5px;color:rgba(255,255,255,.7);}
.toast .tx{font-family:var(--mono);font-weight:700;color:var(--amber);font-size:13px;margin-left:auto;}

#badgePop{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:210;background:rgba(34,28,68,.55);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);
  display:none;place-items:center;animation:fade .3s;}
#badgePop.on{display:grid;}
#resetConfirm{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:230;background:rgba(34,28,68,.55);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);
  display:none;place-items:center;animation:fade .3s;padding:20px;}
#resetConfirm.on{display:grid;}
.badge-modal{background:#fff;border-radius:20px;padding:42px 46px;text-align:center;max-width:380px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);
  animation:pop .5s cubic-bezier(.2,1.5,.4,1);}
@keyframes pop{from{transform:scale(.7);opacity:0;}to{transform:none;opacity:1;}}
.badge-big{width:104px;height:104px;border-radius:28px;margin:0 auto 20px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:52px;
  background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--amber),var(--coral));box-shadow:0 14px 40px -10px rgba(245,166,35,.6);
  animation:badgeSpin 1s ease;}
@keyframes badgeSpin{0%{transform:rotateY(0) scale(.6);}100%{transform:rotateY(720deg) scale(1);}}
.badge-modal .eyebrow{color:var(--amber);margin-bottom:8px;}
.badge-modal h3{font-size:26px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.badge-modal p{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:22px;}

/* ============ PROGRESS / BADGES VIEW ============ */
.prog-hero{background:linear-gradient(150deg,#3C5474,#2A3A54);border-radius:20px;padding:40px 44px;color:#fff;
  box-shadow:var(--shadow);margin-bottom:30px;position:relative;overflow:hidden;}
.prog-hero .eyebrow{color:rgba(255,255,255,.75);margin-bottom:10px;}
.prog-hero h2{font-size:38px;color:#fff;margin-bottom:6px;}
.prog-hero .sub{color:rgba(255,255,255,.82);font-size:15px;}
.prog-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:16px;margin-top:26px;}
.pstat{background:rgba(255,255,255,.14);border:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.2);border-radius:16px;padding:16px;}
.pstat .n{font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:700;font-size:30px;}
.pstat .l{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;opacity:.8;margin-top:3px;}
@media(max-width:680px){.prog-stats{grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;}}
.badge-shelf{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fill,minmax(140px,1fr));gap:16px;}
.bcell{background:var(--card);border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:var(--r);padding:22px 16px;text-align:center;transition:.2s;}
.bcell .bi{width:60px;height:60px;border-radius:18px;margin:0 auto 12px;display:grid;place-items:center;font-size:30px;
  background:var(--paper2);filter:grayscale(1);opacity:.45;transition:.3s;}
.bcell[data-earned="1"] .bi{filter:none;opacity:1;background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--amber-soft),var(--coral-soft));}
.bcell .bn{font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:700;font-size:14px;margin-bottom:4px;}
.bcell .bd{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--ink-faint);}
.bcell[data-earned="1"]{border-color:var(--amber);}

.footer{padding:46px 0 60px;text-align:center;color:var(--ink-faint);font-size:13px;}
.footer .eyebrow{color:var(--violet);margin-bottom:10px;}
.reset-link{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-faint);text-decoration:underline;cursor:pointer;}


.fig-img{display:block;width:100%;max-width:600px;height:auto;margin:2px auto 0;border-radius:14px;}

/* ── ACCOUNTS / CLOUD SYNC ── */
.acct-btn{font-family:var(--body);font-weight:600;font-size:13px;padding:9px 16px;border-radius:20px;
  background:var(--violet-soft);color:var(--violet);border:1.5px solid transparent;transition:.2s;cursor:pointer;white-space:nowrap;}
.acct-btn:hover{border-color:var(--violet);}
.acct-btn.signed-in{background:var(--green-soft);color:var(--green);}
#authModal{position:fixed;inset:0;z-index:220;background:rgba(34,28,68,.55);backdrop-filter:blur(6px);
  display:none;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:20px;}
#authModal.on{display:flex;}
.auth-modal{background:#fff;border-radius:20px;padding:40px 38px;max-width:390px;width:100%;box-shadow:var(--shadow);position:relative;animation:authPop .28s cubic-bezier(.2,.9,.3,1.3);}
@keyframes authPop{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(14px) scale(.97);}to{opacity:1;transform:none;}}
.auth-modal h3{font-size:25px;margin-bottom:8px;}
.modal-close{position:absolute;top:14px;right:16px;background:none;border:none;font-size:22px;color:var(--ink-faint);cursor:pointer;line-height:1;padding:6px;}
.modal-close:hover{color:var(--ink);}
.auth-input{width:100%;padding:12px 14px;border-radius:10px;border:1.5px solid var(--line);font-family:var(--body);font-size:14.5px;color:var(--ink);box-sizing:border-box;}
.auth-input:focus{outline:none;border-color:var(--violet);}
.auth-msg{font-size:13px;margin-top:12px;color:var(--ink-soft);min-height:18px;}
.auth-msg.error{color:var(--coral);}
.auth-msg.success{color:var(--green);}
.google-btn{width:100%;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:10px;padding:12px 16px;border-radius:10px;
  background:#fff;border:1.5px solid var(--line);font-family:var(--body);font-weight:600;font-size:14.5px;color:var(--ink);cursor:pointer;transition:.2s;}
.google-btn:hover{border-color:var(--ink-soft);box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}
.google-btn svg{width:18px;height:18px;flex:none;}
.auth-divider{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;margin:18px 0;color:var(--ink-faint);font-size:12px;letter-spacing:.08em;}
.auth-divider::before,.auth-divider::after{content:'';flex:1;height:1px;background:var(--line);}

/* ── AUTH / LOGIN PAGE (full view) ── */
.auth-page{min-height:calc(100vh - 140px);display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;padding:40px 20px;}
.auth-card{background:#fff;border-radius:24px;padding:48px 44px;max-width:440px;width:100%;box-shadow:var(--shadow);border:1px solid var(--line);}
.auth-card .brand-lockup{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;justify-content:center;margin-bottom:6px;}
.auth-card .brand-lockup .bm{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:12px;}
.auth-card h2{font-size:30px;text-align:center;margin-bottom:6px;}
.auth-card .sub{text-align:center;color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:28px;}
.auth-tabs{display:flex;background:var(--paper2);border-radius:12px;padding:4px;margin-bottom:24px;}
.auth-tab{flex:1;padding:10px;border:none;background:none;border-radius:9px;font-family:var(--body);font-weight:600;font-size:14px;color:var(--ink-soft);cursor:pointer;transition:.2s;}
.auth-tab.active{background:#fff;color:var(--ink);box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);}
.auth-field{margin-bottom:14px;}
.auth-field label{display:block;font-size:12.5px;font-weight:600;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-bottom:6px;letter-spacing:.02em;}

/* ── USERNAME ONBOARDING ── */
.uname-wrap{position:relative;}
.uname-status{position:absolute;right:14px;top:50%;transform:translateY(-50%);font-size:13px;font-weight:600;}
.uname-status.ok{color:var(--green);}
.uname-status.bad{color:var(--coral);}
.uname-status.checking{color:var(--ink-faint);}
.uname-hint{font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-top:6px;}

/* ── PROFILE PAGE ── */
.profile-hero{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--violet-soft),var(--teal-soft));border-radius:24px;padding:40px;text-align:center;position:relative;margin-bottom:26px;overflow:hidden;}
.profile-hero::after{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:radial-gradient(circle at 80% 20%,rgba(255,255,255,.5),transparent 60%);pointer-events:none;}
.profile-avatar{width:96px;height:96px;border-radius:50%;background:#fff;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:52px;margin:0 auto 16px;box-shadow:var(--shadow);position:relative;z-index:1;}
.profile-name{font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:700;font-size:32px;color:var(--ink);position:relative;z-index:1;}
.profile-uname{font-family:var(--mono);font-size:14px;color:var(--violet);margin-top:2px;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.profile-bio{color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:14.5px;max-width:420px;margin:12px auto 0;position:relative;z-index:1;}
.profile-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:14px;margin-bottom:26px;}
.pstat{background:#fff;border:1px solid var(--line);border-radius:16px;padding:20px 14px;text-align:center;}
.pstat .n{font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:700;font-size:30px;color:var(--ink);line-height:1;}
.pstat .l{font-size:11.5px;color:var(--ink-faint);text-transform:uppercase;letter-spacing:.1em;margin-top:6px;}
.emoji-picker{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:8px;margin-top:6px;}
.emoji-opt{width:44px;height:44px;border-radius:11px;border:1.5px solid var(--line);background:#fff;font-size:22px;cursor:pointer;transition:.15s;}
.emoji-opt:hover{border-color:var(--violet);}
.emoji-opt.sel{border-color:var(--violet);background:var(--violet-soft);}
.auth-cta-banner{background:linear-gradient(135deg,var(--violet-soft),var(--coral-soft));border-radius:18px;padding:22px 24px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:18px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:26px;}
.auth-cta-banner .txt{flex:1;min-width:180px;}
.auth-cta-banner h4{font-family:var(--disp);font-size:19px;margin-bottom:2px;}
.auth-cta-banner p{font-size:13.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);}
</style>
<script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@supabase/supabase-js@2"></script>
</head>
<body>

<!-- ============ HUD ============ -->
<header id="hud">
  <div class="brand" onclick="go('home')">
    <img class="brand-mark" src="data:image/png;base64," alt="Humanly">
    <div>
      <span class="brand-name">Human<b>ly</b></span>
      <span class="brand-tag">Understanding ourselves, scientifically</span>
    </div>
  </div>
  <nav class="nav" id="nav">
    <button data-go="home">Home</button>
    <button data-go="quests">Quests</button>
    <button data-go="lessons">Lessons</button>
    <button data-go="missions">Missions</button>
    <button data-go="explorer">3D Brain</button>
    <button data-go="exam">Exam</button>
    <button data-go="progress">Progress</button>
    <button data-go="profile" id="navProfile">Profile</button>
  </nav>
  <div class="hud-right">
    <div class="streak-pill" title="Rewire streak"><span class="flame">🔥</span><span id="streakNum">0</span></div>
    <div class="xp-wrap">
      <div class="xp-top"><span class="xp-rank" id="rankName">Novice Neuron</span><span class="xp-num" id="xpNum">0 XP</span></div>
      <div class="xp-track"><div class="xp-fill" id="xpFill"></div></div>
    </div>
    <div class="avatar" id="avatarLvl">1</div>
    <button class="acct-btn" id="acctBtn" onclick="openAuthModal()">Sign in</button>
  </div>
</header>

<!-- ============ AUTH MODAL ============ -->
<div id="authModal">
  <div class="auth-modal">
    <button class="modal-close" onclick="closeAuthModal()" aria-label="Close">&times;</button>
    <div id="authSignedOut">
      <div class="eyebrow" style="color:var(--violet);">Save your progress</div>
      <h3>Join Humanly</h3>
      <p style="color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:20px;">Create a free account so your XP, badges and streaks follow you to every device.</p>
      <button class="google-btn" onclick="signInWithGoogle()">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill="#4285F4" d="M22.56 12.25c0-.78-.07-1.53-.2-2.25H12v4.26h5.92a5.06 5.06 0 0 1-2.2 3.32v2.77h3.57c2.08-1.92 3.27-4.74 3.27-8.1z"/><path fill="#34A853" d="M12 23c2.97 0 5.46-.98 7.28-2.66l-3.57-2.77c-.98.66-2.23 1.06-3.71 1.06-2.86 0-5.29-1.93-6.16-4.53H2.18v2.84A11 11 0 0 0 12 23z"/><path fill="#FBBC05" d="M5.84 14.1a6.6 6.6 0 0 1 0-4.2V7.06H2.18a11 11 0 0 0 0 9.88l3.66-2.84z"/><path fill="#EA4335" d="M12 5.38c1.62 0 3.06.56 4.21 1.64l3.15-3.15C17.45 2.09 14.97 1 12 1 7.7 1 3.99 3.47 2.18 7.06l3.66 2.84C6.71 7.31 9.14 5.38 12 5.38z"/></svg>
        Continue with Google
      </button>
      <div class="auth-divider">OR</div>
      <input type="email" id="authEmail" placeholder="you@example.com" class="auth-input" autocomplete="email" />
      <button class="btn btn-primary" id="authSendLink" style="width:100%;justify-content:center;margin-top:12px;" onclick="sendMagicLink()">Email me a magic link</button>
      <p id="authMsg" class="auth-msg"></p>
    </div>
    <div id="authSignedIn" style="display:none;">
      <div class="eyebrow" style="color:var(--green);">Signed in</div>
      <h3 id="authEmailDisplay">you@example.com</h3>
      <p style="color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:20px;">Your progress syncs automatically across every device you sign into.</p>
      <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="width:100%;justify-content:center;" onclick="signOutUser()">Sign out</button>
    </div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ============ HOME ============ -->
<section id="v-home" class="view on">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="hero">
      <div class="hero-grid">
        <div>
          <div class="hero-eyebrow eyebrow">Welcome to Humanly</div>
          <h1><span class="ink">The science of</span><br><span class="grad">being human</span></h1>
          <p class="hero-lead">Eighty-six billion neurons. Three pounds of tissue. Every thought, memory and feeling you've ever had. Humanly is where curiosity meets science, understand how your brain works by exploring it, building it, and rewiring it.</p>
          <div class="hero-cta">
            <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="go('quests')">Start your quest →</button>
            <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="go('explorer')">Open the 3D brain</button>
          </div>
          <div class="hero-stats">
            <div class="hstat"><div class="n">86B</div><div class="l">Neurons</div></div>
            <div class="hstat"><div class="n">13</div><div class="l">Lessons</div></div>
            <div class="hstat"><div class="n">8</div><div class="l">Missions</div></div>
          </div>
        </div>
        <div class="hero-art">
          <img src="data:image/png;base64," alt="The Humanly brain, where growth begins" style="position:absolute;inset:0;width:100%;height:100%;object-fit:contain;padding:10px;">
          <div class="hero-art-cap"><b>Humanly</b> · brain → growth → discovery</div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- QUEST PATHWAY -->
    <div class="sec">
      <div class="sec-head">
        <div class="eyebrow">The Synaptic Pathway</div>
        <h2>Four missions, one circuit</h2>
        <p>Complete each quest to fire the next node. Neurons that fire together, wire together, watch your pathway light up as you learn.</p>
      </div>
      <div class="path-wrap">
        <svg class="path-svg" id="pathSvg" preserveAspectRatio="none"></svg>
        <div class="quest-row" id="questRow"></div>
      </div>
    </div>

    <!-- OUTCOMES + TOPICS -->
    <div class="sec" style="padding-top:0;">
      <div class="split">
        <div class="panel">
          <h3><span class="dot" style="background:var(--violet)"></span>What you'll be able to do</h3>
          <ul class="olist">
            <li><span class="ck">✓</span><span>Identify the <b>major brain structures</b> and the systems they belong to</span></li>
            <li><span class="ck">✓</span><span>Explain how a <b>neuron fires</b> and passes signals across a synapse</span></li>
            <li><span class="ck">✓</span><span>Describe the <b>key neurotransmitters</b> and what happens when they go awry</span></li>
            <li><span class="ck">✓</span><span>Explain <b>neuroplasticity</b> and how experience reshapes the brain</span></li>
            <li><span class="ck">✓</span><span>Analyse <b>brain injuries</b> and predict their behavioural effects</span></li>
          </ul>
        </div>
        <div class="panel">
          <h3><span class="dot" style="background:var(--coral)"></span>Topics in this module</h3>
          <p style="color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:14.5px;margin-bottom:16px;">A foundation-level survey comparable to first-year psychology, taught through play.</p>
          <div class="tchips">
            <span class="tchip">Nervous System</span><span class="tchip">Brain Anatomy</span>
            <span class="tchip">Subcortical Structures</span><span class="tchip">Neurons</span>
            <span class="tchip">Action Potentials</span><span class="tchip">Neurotransmitters</span>
            <span class="tchip">Brain Development</span><span class="tchip">Neuroplasticity</span>
            <span class="tchip">Brain Imaging</span><span class="tchip">Injury &amp; Recovery</span>
          </div>
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" style="margin-top:22px;" onclick="go('lessons')">Browse all lessons →</button>
        </div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ QUESTS ============ -->
<section id="v-quests" class="view">
  <div class="wrap sec">
    <div class="sec-head">
      <div class="eyebrow">Quest 2 · Inside the Human Machine</div>
      <h2>Two quests, eight missions</h2>
      <p>Each mission pairs a hands-on activity with the lessons behind it. Quest 2 builds the machine; Quest 3 explores the mind. Finish a quest to earn its crest.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="path-wrap" style="margin-bottom:30px;">
      <svg class="path-svg" id="pathSvg2" preserveAspectRatio="none"></svg>
      <div class="quest-row" id="questRow2"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sec-head" style="margin-top:36px;">
      <div class="eyebrow">Quest 3 · Mind &amp; Methods</div>
      <h2>Four more missions</h2>
      <p>Memory, attention, language and clinical reasoning, the cognitive, neuropsychological side of the brain.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="path-wrap" style="margin-bottom:30px;">
      <svg class="path-svg" id="pathSvg3" preserveAspectRatio="none"></svg>
      <div class="quest-row" id="questRow3"></div>
    </div>
    <div class="sec-head" style="margin-top:10px;">
      <h2 style="font-size:26px;">Jump straight into a mission</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="mgrid" id="questMissionGrid"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ LESSONS ============ -->
<section id="v-lessons" class="view">
  <div class="wrap sec">
    <div class="sec-head">
      <div class="eyebrow">Core Study Notes</div>
      <h2>Thirteen lessons, start to synapse</h2>
      <p>Read at your own pace. Each lesson ends with a short quiz that banks XP. Tap any card to begin.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="lgrid" id="lessonGrid"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ LESSON READER ============ -->
<section id="v-lesson" class="view">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="reader-top">
      <button class="back-btn" onclick="go('lessons')">← All lessons</button>
      <span id="readerProgress" class="mono" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-faint);"></span>
    </div>
    <article class="reader" id="readerBody"></article>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ MISSIONS HUB ============ -->
<section id="v-missions" class="view">
  <div class="wrap sec">
    <div class="sec-head">
      <div class="eyebrow">Practical Activities</div>
      <h2>Learn by doing</h2>
      <p>Eight interactive missions turn the science into something you can touch, solve, and build. Each one banks XP and unlocks a badge.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="mgrid" id="missionGrid"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- individual mission stages get injected here -->
<section id="v-mission" class="view"><div class="wrap sec"><div class="reader-top"><button class="back-btn" onclick="go('missions')">← All missions</button></div><div id="missionStage"></div></div></section>

<!-- ============ 3D BRAIN EXPLORER ============ -->
<section id="v-explorer" class="view">
  <div class="wrap sec">
    <div class="sec-head">
      <div class="eyebrow">Mission · Brain Districts</div>
      <h2>The 3D specimen</h2>
      <p>Drag to rotate, scroll to zoom, and click any region to open its dossier, function, neuroscience notes, and clinical relevance. Explode the model to see every part.</p>
    </div>
    <div id="brainShell"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ EXAM ============ -->
<section id="v-exam" class="view">
  <div class="wrap sec">
    <div class="sec-head">
      <div class="eyebrow">Practical Assessment</div>
      <h2>Module 2 examination</h2>
      <p>Twelve questions spanning every lesson. Score 70% or higher to earn the Module 2 Mastery badge. You can retake it any time.</p>
    </div>
    <div id="examStage" class="stage"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ PROGRESS ============ -->
<section id="v-progress" class="view">
  <div class="wrap sec">
    <div class="prog-hero">
      <div class="eyebrow">Your neural record</div>
      <h2 id="progRank">Novice Neuron</h2>
      <div class="sub" id="progSub">Level 1 · keep firing those synapses</div>
      <div class="prog-stats">
        <div class="pstat"><div class="n" id="psXp">0</div><div class="l">Total XP</div></div>
        <div class="pstat"><div class="n" id="psLessons">0/7</div><div class="l">Lessons</div></div>
        <div class="pstat"><div class="n" id="psMissions">0/4</div><div class="l">Missions</div></div>
        <div class="pstat"><div class="n" id="psBadges">0</div><div class="l">Badges</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
    <div class="sec-head"><h2 style="font-size:26px;">Badge collection</h2></div>
    <div class="badge-shelf" id="badgeShelf"></div>
    <div class="footer">
      <div class="eyebrow">Humanly</div>
      <p>A foundation-level neuroscience module. Educational use, not medical advice.</p>
      <p style="margin-top:10px;"><span class="reset-link" onclick="resetProgress()">Reset all progress</span></p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ LOGIN / SIGN-IN PAGE ============ -->
<section id="v-login" class="view">
  <div class="auth-page">
    <div class="auth-card">
      <div class="brand-lockup">
        <span class="brand-name" style="font-size:26px;">Human<b>ly</b></span>
      </div>
      <h2 id="loginTitle">Welcome back</h2>
      <p class="sub" id="loginSub">Sign in to sync your progress across devices.</p>

      <div class="auth-tabs">
        <button class="auth-tab active" id="tabSignin" onclick="switchAuthTab('signin')">Sign in</button>
        <button class="auth-tab" id="tabSignup" onclick="switchAuthTab('signup')">Create account</button>
      </div>

      <button class="google-btn" onclick="signInWithGoogle()">
        <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"><path fill="#4285F4" d="M22.56 12.25c0-.78-.07-1.53-.2-2.25H12v4.26h5.92a5.06 5.06 0 0 1-2.2 3.32v2.77h3.57c2.08-1.92 3.27-4.74 3.27-8.1z"/><path fill="#34A853" d="M12 23c2.97 0 5.46-.98 7.28-2.66l-3.57-2.77c-.98.66-2.23 1.06-3.71 1.06-2.86 0-5.29-1.93-6.16-4.53H2.18v2.84A11 11 0 0 0 12 23z"/><path fill="#FBBC05" d="M5.84 14.1a6.6 6.6 0 0 1 0-4.2V7.06H2.18a11 11 0 0 0 0 9.88l3.66-2.84z"/><path fill="#EA4335" d="M12 5.38c1.62 0 3.06.56 4.21 1.64l3.15-3.15C17.45 2.09 14.97 1 12 1 7.7 1 3.99 3.47 2.18 7.06l3.66 2.84C6.71 7.31 9.14 5.38 12 5.38z"/></svg>
        <span id="googleBtnLabel">Continue with Google</span>
      </button>

      <div class="auth-divider">OR</div>

      <div class="auth-field">
        <label for="loginEmail">Email address</label>
        <input type="email" id="loginEmail" placeholder="you@example.com" class="auth-input" autocomplete="email" />
      </div>
      <button class="btn btn-primary" style="width:100%;justify-content:center;" onclick="sendMagicLink()" id="loginMagicBtn">Email me a magic link</button>
      <p id="loginMsg" class="auth-msg" style="text-align:center;"></p>

      <p style="text-align:center;margin-top:18px;font-size:13px;color:var(--ink-faint);">
        Or <span class="reset-link" onclick="go('home')">keep exploring without an account</span>
      </p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ============ PROFILE PAGE ============ -->
<section id="v-profile" class="view">
  <div class="wrap sec">
    <div id="profileBody"></div>
  </div>
</section>

<script>
/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   NEURALQUEST · CORE ENGINE
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
const DEFAULT_STATE={xp:0,lessons:{},missions:{},badges:{},quizzes:{},rewire:{skill:'',days:[false,false,false,false,false,false,false],last:''},streak:0};
let S=loadState();

function loadState(){
  try{const r=localStorage.getItem('neuralquest_v1');if(r)return Object.assign(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEFAULT_STATE)),JSON.parse(r));}catch(e){}
  return JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEFAULT_STATE));
}
function saveState(){
  try{localStorage.setItem('neuralquest_v1',JSON.stringify(S));}catch(e){}
  syncToCloud();
}

/* ── CLOUD SYNC (Supabase) ── */
const SUPABASE_URL='https://qaminbhfgkkjlbwlatvw.supabase.co';
const SUPABASE_ANON_KEY='sb_publishable_-tyRUd_s-HRmXtnEWl6Bfw_kAEMZpKo';
const sb=(window.supabase&&window.supabase.createClient)?window.supabase.createClient(SUPABASE_URL,SUPABASE_ANON_KEY):null;
let currentUser=null;
let cloudSaveTimer=null;

function syncToCloud(){
  if(!sb||!currentUser)return;
  clearTimeout(cloudSaveTimer);
  cloudSaveTimer=setTimeout(()=>{
    sb.from('progress').upsert({user_id:currentUser.id,data:S,updated_at:new Date().toISOString()})
      .then(({error})=>{ if(error)console.warn('Cloud sync failed:',error.message); });
  },600);
}

async function loadCloud(){
  if(!sb||!currentUser){ if(typeof boot==='function')boot(); return; }
  try{
    const {data,error}=await sb.from('progress').select('data').eq('user_id',currentUser.id).maybeSingle();
    if(error)throw error;
    if(data && data.data){
      S=Object.assign(JSON.parse(JSON.stringify(DEFAULT_STATE)),data.data);
      try{localStorage.setItem('neuralquest_v1',JSON.stringify(S));}catch(e){}
    }else{
      syncToCloud();
    }
  }catch(e){ console.warn('Cloud load failed:',e.message||e); }
  if(typeof boot==='function')boot();
}

/* ── RANKS / LEVELS ── */
const RANKS=[
  {xp:0,name:'Novice Neuron'},{xp:150,name:'Synapse Scout'},{xp:350,name:'Dendrite Cadet'},
  {xp:600,name:'Axon Adept'},{xp:900,name:'Cortex Explorer'},{xp:1300,name:'Limbic Lieutenant'},
  {xp:1800,name:'Neural Navigator'},{xp:2500,name:'Brain Cartographer'}
];
function rankFor(xp){
  let lvl=0;for(let i=0;i<RANKS.length;i++){if(xp>=RANKS[i].xp)lvl=i;}
  const cur=RANKS[lvl],next=RANKS[lvl+1];
  return {level:lvl+1,name:cur.name,base:cur.xp,next:next?next.xp:cur.xp,isMax:!next};
}

/* ── BADGES ── */
const BADGES={
  neuron_architect:{icon:'🔬',name:'Neuron Architect',desc:'Assembled a fully working neuron.'},
  district_explorer:{icon:'🗺️',name:'District Explorer',desc:'Mapped every major brain region.'},
  detective:{icon:'🕵️',name:'Synaptic Detective',desc:'Cracked all the neurotransmitter cases.'},
  rewired:{icon:'🔁',name:'Rewired',desc:'Completed the 7-day neuroplasticity challenge.'},
  scholar:{icon:'📚',name:'Brain Scholar',desc:'Read all seven core lessons.'},
  quizwhiz:{icon:'⚡',name:'Quiz Whiz',desc:'Scored 100% on a lesson quiz.'},
  mastery:{icon:'🎓',name:'Module 2 Master',desc:'Passed the module examination.'},
  questcrest:{icon:'🧠',name:'Quest 2 Crest',desc:'Completed all four Quest 2 missions.'},
  lobemaster:{icon:'🧩',name:'Cortographer',desc:'Labelled every lobe of the brain.'},
  matchmaker:{icon:'🃏',name:'Memory Matched',desc:'Paired every structure with its function.'},
  stroopmaster:{icon:'🎨',name:'Focus Master',desc:'Completed the Stroop attention test.'},
  neuropsychologist:{icon:'🧠',name:'Neuro-Detective',desc:'Localised every lesion case correctly.'},
  quest3crest:{icon:'🏆',name:'Quest 3 Crest',desc:'Completed all four Mind & Methods missions.'}
};

/* ── AWARDS ── */
function awardXP(n,label){
  S.xp+=n;saveState();updateHUD();
  toast('⚡',(label||'XP earned'),'',('+'+n+' XP'));
}
function unlockBadge(id){
  if(S.badges[id])return;
  S.badges[id]=Date.now();saveState();
  const b=BADGES[id];
  document.getElementById('bpIcon').textContent=b.icon;
  document.getElementById('bpName').textContent=b.name;
  document.getElementById('bpDesc').textContent=b.desc;
  document.getElementById('badgePop').classList.add('on');
  renderBadgeShelf();
}
function toast(icon,title,sub,xp){
  const el=document.createElement('div');el.className='toast';
  el.innerHTML=`<span class="ti">${icon}</span><div><div class="tt">${title}</div>${sub?`<div class="ts">${sub}</div>`:''}</div>${xp?`<span class="tx">${xp}</span>`:''}`;
  document.getElementById('toasts').appendChild(el);
  setTimeout(()=>{el.style.transition='.4s';el.style.opacity='0';el.style.transform='translateX(120%)';setTimeout(()=>el.remove(),400);},3400);
}

/* ── HUD ── */
function updateHUD(){
  const r=rankFor(S.xp);
  document.getElementById('rankName').textContent=r.name;
  document.getElementById('xpNum').textContent=S.xp+' XP';
  document.getElementById('avatarLvl').textContent=r.level;
  const pct=r.isMax?100:Math.round((S.xp-r.base)/(r.next-r.base)*100);
  document.getElementById('xpFill').style.width=pct+'%';
  document.getElementById('streakNum').textContent=S.streak||0;
}

/* ── ROUTER ── */
const VIEWS=['home','quests','lessons','lesson','missions','mission','explorer','exam','progress','login','profile'];
function go(v,arg){
  VIEWS.forEach(x=>document.getElementById('v-'+x).classList.toggle('on',x===v));
  document.querySelectorAll('#nav button').forEach(b=>b.classList.toggle('active',b.dataset.go===v));
  window.scrollTo({top:0,behavior:'instant'});
  if(v==='quests'){renderPathway('pathSvg2','questRow2');renderPathway('pathSvg3','questRow3',QUESTS3);}
  if(v==='explorer'){initBrain();}
  if(v==='exam'){renderExam();}
  if(v==='progress'){renderProgress();}
  if(v==='lesson'&&arg!=null){renderLesson(arg);}
  if(v==='mission'&&arg!=null){buildMissionStage(arg);}
  if(v==='login'){renderLogin();}
  if(v==='profile'){renderProfile();}
}
document.querySelectorAll('#nav button').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',()=>go(b.dataset.go)));

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   QUEST PATHWAY (signature element)
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
const QUESTS=[
  {id:'q1',n:'Lesson 1',t:'Meet Your 86 Billion Roommates',icon:'🔬',mission:'build',m:'Build a neuron',color:'var(--violet)'},
  {id:'q2',n:'Lesson 2',t:'The City Inside Your Skull',icon:'🗺️',mission:'explorer',m:'Explore the brain districts',color:'var(--coral)'},
  {id:'q3',n:'Lesson 3',t:'Chemical Messengers',icon:'🕵️',mission:'mystery',m:'Solve a neurotransmitter mystery',color:'var(--teal)'},
  {id:'q4',n:'Lesson 4',t:'The Brain That Rewires Itself',icon:'🔁',mission:'rewire',m:'Train a micro-skill for 7 days',color:'var(--green)'}
];
const QUESTS3=[
  {id:'q5',n:'Lesson 2',t:'Map the Cortex',icon:'🧩',mission:'label',m:'Label the four lobes',color:'var(--coral)'},
  {id:'q6',n:'Lesson 8',t:'The Memory Machine',icon:'🃏',mission:'match',m:'Match structures to functions',color:'var(--teal)'},
  {id:'q7',n:'Lesson 10',t:'Attention & Interference',icon:'🎨',mission:'stroop',m:'Take the Stroop test',color:'var(--violet)'},
  {id:'q8',n:'Lesson 13',t:'Think Like a Clinician',icon:'🧠',mission:'lesion',m:'Crack the lesion cases',color:'var(--green)'}
];
function questDone(q){return !!S.missions[q.mission];}

const MISSION_IC={"build": "neuron", "explorer": "brain", "mystery": "synapse", "rewire": "sprout", "label": "tag", "match": "cards", "stroop": "eye", "lesion": "loupe"};
function renderQuests(rowId,quests){
  quests=quests||QUESTS;
  const row=document.getElementById(rowId);
  row.innerHTML=quests.map((q,i)=>`
    <div class="qcard" data-done="${questDone(q)?1:0}" onclick="openMission('${q.mission}')">
      <span class="q-badge">● complete</span>
      <div class="qnode" style="--c:${q.color};border-color:${q.color};color:${questDone(q)?'#fff':q.color};">${ICONS[MISSION_IC[q.mission]]||q.icon}</div>
      <div class="q-n">${q.n}</div>
      <div class="q-t">${q.t}</div>
      <div class="q-mission">Mission: <b>${q.m}</b></div>
    </div>`).join('');
}
function renderPathway(svgId,rowId,quests){
  quests=quests||QUESTS;
  renderQuests(rowId,quests);
  const svg=document.getElementById(svgId);if(!svg)return;
  const row=document.getElementById(rowId);
  requestAnimationFrame(()=>{
    const rw=row.getBoundingClientRect();
    const cards=[...row.children];
    if(!cards.length)return;
    const W=row.offsetWidth, H=row.offsetHeight;
    svg.setAttribute('viewBox',`0 0 ${W} ${H}`);
    let pts=cards.map(c=>{const r=c.getBoundingClientRect();return {x:r.left-rw.left+38,y:r.top-rw.top+40};});
    let d='';
    for(let i=0;i<pts.length-1;i++){
      const a=pts[i],b=pts[i+1],mx=(a.x+b.x)/2;
      d+=`M${a.x} ${a.y} C ${mx} ${a.y}, ${mx} ${b.y}, ${b.x} ${b.y} `;
    }
    const doneCount=quests.filter(questDone).length;
    svg.innerHTML=`
      <path d="${d}" fill="none" stroke="#EBE3EC" stroke-width="3" stroke-dasharray="2 8" stroke-linecap="round"/>
      <path d="${d}" fill="none" stroke="url(#axonGrad)" stroke-width="3.5" stroke-linecap="round"
        style="stroke-dasharray:${1000};stroke-dashoffset:${1000-(doneCount/Math.max(1,quests.length-1))*1000};transition:stroke-dashoffset 1s ease;opacity:${doneCount>0?1:0};">
        ${doneCount>0?'<animate attributeName="stroke-width" values="3.5;5;3.5" dur="2s" repeatCount="indefinite"/>':''}
      </path>
      <defs><linearGradient id="axonGrad" x1="0" y1="0" x2="1" y2="0">
        <stop offset="0" stop-color="#7B6FD4"/><stop offset="0.5" stop-color="#DD8468"/><stop offset="1" stop-color="#6FA67B"/>
      </linearGradient></defs>`;
  });
}
