      <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="missionMystery()">Play again</button>
      <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="go('missions')">All missions</button>
    </div></div>`;
  const isNew=completeMission('mystery',caseScore>=4?'detective':null,xp);
  if(caseScore>=4&&isNew){/* badge handled */}
  else if(caseScore>=4)toast('🕵️','Sharp detective work','','');
  else toast('🧠','Mission logged','Solve 4+ to earn the badge','+'+xp+' XP');
}

/* ── MISSION 4 · 7-DAY REWIRE ── */
const REWIRE_PRESETS=['Learn 5 new words in another language','Practise an instrument for 10 min','Do 20 push-ups','Meditate for 5 minutes','Sketch one small drawing','Read 10 pages','Practise mental math'];
function missionRewire(){
  const r=S.rewire;
  const checked=r.days.filter(Boolean).length;
  document.getElementById('missionStage').innerHTML=`
   <div class="stage">
    <div class="stage-head">
      <div><div class="eyebrow" style="color:var(--green)">Mission · Lesson 4</div><h2>7-Day Rewire Challenge</h2>
      <p>Plasticity favours effort that is repeated daily. Choose one tiny skill and check it off each day. Completing all seven physically strengthens the connections you\'re training.</p></div>
      <div class="mono" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-faint)">+150 XP</div>
    </div>
    <label class="mono" style="font-size:11px;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--ink-faint);">Your micro-skill</label>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:8px;margin:8px 0 6px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <input id="rwSkill" value="${r.skill||''}" placeholder="e.g. Practise piano for 10 minutes"
        style="flex:1;min-width:220px;padding:13px 16px;border:1.5px solid var(--line);border-radius:13px;font-family:var(--body);font-size:15px;">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost" id="rwSave">Save</button>
    </div>
    <div style="display:flex;gap:6px;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:24px;">
      ${REWIRE_PRESETS.slice(0,4).map(p=>`<button class="rwPreset tchip" style="cursor:pointer;border:none;" data-p="${p}">${p}</button>`).join('')}
    </div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(7,1fr);gap:10px;" id="rwDays">
      ${r.days.map((d,i)=>`<button class="rwDay" data-i="${i}" style="aspect-ratio:.85;border-radius:14px;border:2px solid ${d?'var(--green)':'var(--line)'};background:${d?'var(--green)':'#fff'};color:${d?'#fff':'var(--ink-faint)'};display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:4px;transition:.2s;">
        <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.08em;">DAY</span>
        <span style="font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:700;font-size:22px;">${i+1}</span>
        <span style="font-size:16px;">${d?'✓':'○'}</span></button>`).join('')}
    </div>
    <div style="height:9px;border-radius:6px;background:var(--paper2);overflow:hidden;margin-top:22px;">
      <div style="height:100%;width:${checked/7*100}%;background:linear-gradient(90deg,var(--green),var(--teal));border-radius:6px;transition:.5s;"></div>
    </div>
    <p style="text-align:center;color:var(--ink-soft);font-size:14px;margin-top:12px;">${checked}/7 days · ${checked===7?'Challenge complete, you rewired your brain! 🎉':'tick a day each time you practise'}</p>
   </div>`;
  document.getElementById('rwSave').addEventListener('click',()=>{S.rewire.skill=document.getElementById('rwSkill').value;saveState();toast('💾','Skill saved','','');});
  document.querySelectorAll('.rwPreset').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',()=>{document.getElementById('rwSkill').value=b.dataset.p;S.rewire.skill=b.dataset.p;saveState();}));
  document.querySelectorAll('.rwDay').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',()=>toggleRewireDay(+b.dataset.i)));
}
function toggleRewireDay(i){
  if(!S.rewire.skill||!S.rewire.skill.trim()){toast('✍️','Pick a skill first','Name what you\'re training','');return;}
  const today=new Date().toDateString();
  S.rewire.days[i]=!S.rewire.days[i];
  if(S.rewire.days[i]){
    if(S.rewire.last!==today){S.streak=(S.streak||0)+1;S.rewire.last=today;}
    S.xp+=30;
  }
  saveState();updateHUD();
  const done=S.rewire.days.filter(Boolean).length;
  if(done===7){completeMission('rewire','rewired',150);}
  else toast('🔁','Day logged','+1 streak day','+30 XP');
  missionRewire();
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   EXAM
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */

/* ════════ NEW MISSIONS · Quest 3 ════════ */
const LABEL_REGIONS=[
 {id:'frontal',name:'Frontal',hint:'planning · movement',cx:175,cy:215,fill:'#7B6FD4'},
 {id:'parietal',name:'Parietal',hint:'touch · space',cx:400,cy:175,fill:'#6FA67B'},
 {id:'occipital',name:'Occipital',hint:'vision',cx:625,cy:205,fill:'#6E97C6'},
 {id:'temporal',name:'Temporal',hint:'hearing · memory',cx:430,cy:335,fill:'#D7A24C'},
 {id:'cerebellum',name:'Cerebellum',hint:'balance · timing',cx:665,cy:312,fill:'#DD8468'},
 {id:'brainstem',name:'Brainstem',hint:'vital functions',cx:393,cy:448,fill:'#5E6E88'}
];
const LABEL_PATHS={
 frontal:'M60 250 C70 150 150 95 250 92 L300 92 C300 200 290 300 286 336 C250 352 176 350 138 322 C96 300 60 292 60 250 Z',
 parietal:'M300 92 C390 90 470 96 520 110 L520 250 C460 250 360 250 300 250 Z',
 occipital:'M520 110 C620 128 726 156 744 224 C756 268 742 308 700 322 C660 318 600 300 566 288 C540 282 522 280 520 270 L520 110 Z',
 temporal:'M284 322 C360 302 470 298 566 288 C588 308 600 330 612 352 C566 374 470 384 398 378 C346 374 300 366 284 334 Z',
 cerebellum:'M612 350 C690 356 742 322 724 280 C690 300 700 330 660 332 C636 334 622 342 612 350 Z',
 brainstem:'M398 378 C404 420 420 446 408 466 C392 446 384 414 380 380 Z'
};
let labelSel=null,labelDone={};
function missionLabel(){
  labelSel=null;labelDone={};
  const chips=[...LABEL_REGIONS].sort(()=>Math.random()-0.5);
  const zones=LABEL_REGIONS.map(r=>`<g class="lzone" data-id="${r.id}" style="cursor:pointer;"><path d="${LABEL_PATHS[r.id]}" fill="#E9E3F6" stroke="#324A6D" stroke-width="2"/><text x="${r.cx}" y="${r.cy}" text-anchor="middle" font-family="'Hanken Grotesk',sans-serif" font-weight="800" font-size="13" fill="#9BA6BA" class="lzlab">?</text></g>`).join('');
  document.getElementById('missionStage').innerHTML=`
   <div class="stage">
    <div class="stage-head"><div><div class="eyebrow" style="color:var(--coral)">Mission · Lesson 2</div><h2>Label the Lobes</h2>
    <p>Tap a name below, then tap the matching region on the brain. Place all six correctly to map the cortex.</p></div>
    <div class="mono" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-faint)">+120 XP</div></div>
    <svg viewBox="0 0 820 470" style="width:100%;height:auto;margin-bottom:18px;">${zones}</svg>
    <div id="lChips" style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;justify-content:center;">
      ${chips.map(r=>`<button class="lchip" data-id="${r.id}" style="border:1.5px solid var(--line);background:#fff;border-radius:13px;padding:11px 16px;font-weight:700;font-size:14px;transition:.15s;cursor:pointer;">${r.name}<span style="display:block;font-size:10px;color:var(--ink-faint);font-weight:400;">${r.hint}</span></button>`).join('')}
    </div>
    <div id="lMsg" style="text-align:center;margin-top:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink-soft);">0 / 6 placed</div>
   </div>`;
  document.querySelectorAll('.lchip').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',()=>{
    if(b.classList.contains('used'))return;
    labelSel=b.dataset.id;
    document.querySelectorAll('.lchip').forEach(x=>x.style.borderColor='var(--line)');
    b.style.borderColor='var(--coral)';
  }));
  document.querySelectorAll('.lzone').forEach(z=>z.addEventListener('click',()=>labelDrop(z.dataset.id)));
}
function labelDrop(zoneId){
  if(labelDone[zoneId])return;
  const msg=document.getElementById('lMsg');
  if(!labelSel){msg.textContent='Pick a name first, then tap a region.';return;}
  const z=document.querySelector(`.lzone[data-id="${zoneId}"]`);
  if(labelSel===zoneId){
    const r=LABEL_REGIONS.find(x=>x.id===zoneId);
    labelDone[zoneId]=1;
    z.querySelector('path').setAttribute('fill',r.fill);
    const t=z.querySelector('.lzlab');t.textContent=r.name;t.setAttribute('fill','#fff');
    const chip=document.querySelector(`.lchip[data-id="${zoneId}"]`);chip.classList.add('used');chip.style.opacity='.35';chip.style.pointerEvents='none';
    labelSel=null;document.querySelectorAll('.lchip').forEach(x=>x.style.borderColor='var(--line)');
    const n=Object.keys(labelDone).length;msg.textContent=n+' / 6 placed';
    if(n===6){msg.style.color='var(--green)';msg.textContent='Cortex mapped! 🎉';const isNew=completeMission('label','lobemaster',120);if(!isNew)toast('🧩','Replayed','Lobes labelled again','');}
  }else{
    z.querySelector('path').animate([{opacity:1},{opacity:.4},{opacity:1}],{duration:300});
    msg.textContent='Not that region, try another.';
  }
}
const MATCH_PAIRS=[
 {k:'amyg',a:'Amygdala',b:'Fear & threat'},{k:'hipp',a:'Hippocampus',b:'New memories'},
 {k:'cere',a:'Cerebellum',b:'Balance & coordination'},{k:'thal',a:'Thalamus',b:'Sensory relay'},
 {k:'hypo',a:'Hypothalamus',b:'Homeostasis'},{k:'broca',a:'Broca area',b:'Speech output'}
];
let matchCards=[],matchFlip=[],matchDone={},matchLock=false,matchMoves=0;
function missionMatch(){
  matchFlip=[];matchDone={};matchLock=false;matchMoves=0;matchCards=[];
  MATCH_PAIRS.forEach(p=>{matchCards.push({k:p.k,t:p.a});matchCards.push({k:p.k,t:p.b});});
  matchCards.sort(()=>Math.random()-0.5);
  document.getElementById('missionStage').innerHTML=`
   <div class="stage">
    <div class="stage-head"><div><div class="eyebrow" style="color:var(--teal)">Mission · Lesson 8</div><h2>Memory Match</h2>
    <p>Flip two cards to find a brain structure and the job it does. Match all six pairs, a memory game about memory.</p></div>
    <div class="mono" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-faint)">+120 XP</div></div>
    <div id="matchGrid" style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:12px;">
      ${matchCards.map((c,i)=>`<button class="mcard" data-i="${i}" style="aspect-ratio:1.25;border:1.5px solid var(--line);border-radius:14px;background:linear-gradient(135deg,#ECE9FB,#E4EDF7);font-weight:700;font-size:13px;color:transparent;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;padding:8px;transition:.2s;cursor:pointer;">${c.t}</button>`).join('')}
    </div>
    <div id="matchMsg" style="text-align:center;margin-top:18px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink-soft);">Find all 6 pairs</div>
   </div>`;
  document.querySelectorAll('.mcard').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',()=>matchClick(+b.dataset.i)));
}
function matchClick(i){
  if(matchLock||matchDone[i]||matchFlip.includes(i))return;
  const btn=document.querySelector(`.mcard[data-i="${i}"]`);
  btn.style.color='var(--ink)';btn.style.background='#fff';btn.style.borderColor='var(--violet)';
  matchFlip.push(i);
  if(matchFlip.length===2){
    matchMoves++;matchLock=true;
    const a=matchFlip[0],b=matchFlip[1];
    if(matchCards[a].k===matchCards[b].k){
      setTimeout(()=>{
        [a,b].forEach(j=>{matchDone[j]=1;const el=document.querySelector(`.mcard[data-i="${j}"]`);el.style.background='var(--green-soft)';el.style.borderColor='var(--green)';el.style.pointerEvents='none';});
        matchFlip=[];matchLock=false;
        const pairs=Object.keys(matchDone).length/2;
        document.getElementById('matchMsg').textContent=pairs+' / 6 pairs';
        if(pairs===6){const m=document.getElementById('matchMsg');m.style.color='var(--green)';m.textContent=`All matched in ${matchMoves} moves! 🎉`;const isNew=completeMission('match','matchmaker',120);if(!isNew)toast('🃏','Replayed','Matched again','');}
      },380);
    }else{
      setTimeout(()=>{matchFlip.forEach(j=>{const el=document.querySelector(`.mcard[data-i="${j}"]`);el.style.color='transparent';el.style.background='linear-gradient(135deg,#ECE9FB,#E4EDF7)';el.style.borderColor='var(--line)';});matchFlip=[];matchLock=false;},760);
    }
  }
}
const STROOP_COLORS=[{n:'RED',c:'#e23b54'},{n:'BLUE',c:'#2f6df2'},{n:'GREEN',c:'#1fa56e'},{n:'ORANGE',c:'#e08a1e'},{n:'PURPLE',c:'#7B6FD4'}];
let stroopIdx,stroopScore,stroopStart,stroopTimes;
function missionStroop(){
  stroopIdx=0;stroopScore=0;stroopTimes=[];
  document.getElementById('missionStage').innerHTML=`
   <div class="stage">
    <div class="stage-head"><div><div class="eyebrow" style="color:var(--violet)">Mission · Lesson 10</div><h2>The Stroop Test</h2>
    <p>Tap the <b>ink colour</b> of the word, not what the word says. Reading is automatic, so it fights you. 10 quick trials.</p></div>
    <div class="mono" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-faint)">+120 XP</div></div>
    <div id="stroopArea" style="text-align:center;padding:10px 0 4px;"></div>
   </div>`;
  nextStroop();
}
function nextStroop(){
  const area=document.getElementById('stroopArea');
  if(stroopIdx>=10){
    const avg=Math.round(stroopTimes.reduce((a,b)=>a+b,0)/stroopTimes.length);
    const pass=stroopScore>=7;
    area.innerHTML=`<div class="callout ${pass?'key':'case'}" style="text-align:left;"><div class="ct">${pass?'🎨 Focused!':'📌 Tricky, isn’t it?'}</div>
      <p style="font-size:16px;">You got <b>${stroopScore}/10</b> correct, averaging <b>${avg} ms</b> per response. The lag you felt on mismatched trials is <b>Stroop interference</b>, automatic reading competing with the colour-naming task.</p></div>
      <div class="reader-foot" style="border:none;padding:8px 0 0;justify-content:center;"><button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="missionStroop()">Try again</button></div>`;
    if(pass)completeMission('stroop','stroopmaster',120);
    else toast('🎨','Test logged','Score 7+ to earn the badge','');
    return;
  }
  const word=STROOP_COLORS[Math.floor(Math.random()*STROOP_COLORS.length)];
  let ink=STROOP_COLORS[Math.floor(Math.random()*STROOP_COLORS.length)];
  if(Math.random()<0.6){while(ink.n===word.n)ink=STROOP_COLORS[Math.floor(Math.random()*STROOP_COLORS.length)];}
  const opts=[...STROOP_COLORS].sort(()=>Math.random()-0.5);
  stroopStart=Date.now();
  area.innerHTML=`
    <div class="mono" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-bottom:14px;">trial ${stroopIdx+1} / 10 · score ${stroopScore}</div>
    <div style="font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:700;font-size:64px;color:${ink.c};margin:14px 0 26px;letter-spacing:.04em;">${word.n}</div>
    <div style="display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:10px;justify-content:center;">
      ${opts.map(o=>`<button class="sbtn" data-n="${o.n}" style="border:none;border-radius:13px;padding:14px 20px;font-weight:700;font-size:15px;color:#fff;background:${o.c};min-width:96px;transition:.1s;cursor:pointer;">${o.n}</button>`).join('')}
    </div>
    <p class="mono" style="font-size:11px;color:var(--ink-faint);margin-top:16px;">tap the INK colour</p>`;
  document.querySelectorAll('.sbtn').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',()=>{
    stroopTimes.push(Date.now()-stroopStart);
    if(b.dataset.n===ink.n)stroopScore++;
    else b.animate([{transform:'translateX(0)'},{transform:'translateX(-6px)'},{transform:'translateX(6px)'},{transform:'translateX(0)'}],{duration:200});
    stroopIdx++;nextStroop();
  }));
}
const LESION_CASES=[
 {file:'Patient 01',v:'After surgery to control epilepsy, this patient cannot form any new memories, they greet their doctor as a stranger each day, yet older memories and motor skills are intact.',o:['Hippocampus','Cerebellum','Occipital lobe','Brainstem'],a:0,why:'Loss of new memory with intact old memory and skills points to the hippocampus (as in patient H.M.).'},
 {file:'Patient 02',v:'A worker survives a head injury. Intelligence is intact, but the once-reliable, careful person is now impulsive, profane, and unable to plan ahead.',o:['Cerebellum','Frontal lobe','Temporal lobe','Thalamus'],a:1,why:'Personality change with poor planning and impulse control is the signature of frontal-lobe (prefrontal) damage.'},
 {file:'Patient 03',v:'Following a stroke, the patient eats food only from the right side of the plate and ignores people approaching from the left, as if that side of space does not exist.',o:['Left frontal lobe','Right parietal lobe','Occipital lobe','Hippocampus'],a:1,why:'Hemispatial neglect of the left side follows damage to the right parietal lobe.'},
 {file:'Patient 04',v:'The patient speaks fluently and effortlessly, but the words are jumbled and meaningless, and they cannot understand what others say.',o:['Broca area','Cerebellum','Wernicke area','Amygdala'],a:2,why:'Fluent but meaningless speech with poor comprehension is Wernicke aphasia.'},
 {file:'Patient 05',v:'After a tumour near the back of the skull, the patient is clumsy and uncoordinated with a wide, unsteady gait and trouble with smooth movement, but normal strength and sensation.',o:['Cerebellum','Frontal lobe','Hippocampus','Occipital lobe'],a:0,why:'Ataxia, clumsy, uncoordinated movement with intact strength, points to the cerebellum.'},
 {file:'Patient 06',v:'The patient sees perfectly well but can no longer recognise the faces of family and friends, identifying them only by voice.',o:['Occipital V1','Fusiform / temporal lobe','Cerebellum','Hypothalamus'],a:1,why:'Prosopagnosia (face blindness) follows damage to the fusiform face area in the temporal lobe.'}
];
let lesionIdx,lesionScore;
function missionLesion(){lesionIdx=0;lesionScore=0;renderLesionCase();}
function renderLesionCase(){
  if(lesionIdx>=LESION_CASES.length)return lesionDone();
  const c=LESION_CASES[lesionIdx];
  document.getElementById('missionStage').innerHTML=`
   <div class="stage">
    <div class="stage-head"><div><div class="eyebrow" style="color:var(--green)">Mission · Lesson 13</div><h2>Neuro-Detective</h2>
    <p>Read each patient and localise the damage. Think like a clinical neuropsychologist.</p></div>
    <div class="mono" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-faint)">${lesionIdx+1} / ${LESION_CASES.length}</div></div>
    <div class="callout case" style="margin-top:0;"><div class="ct">🗂️ ${c.file}</div><p style="font-size:15.5px;">${c.v}</p></div>
    <div style="display:grid;grid-template-columns:1fr 1fr;gap:11px;margin-top:18px;" id="lesOpts">
      ${c.o.map((o,i)=>`<button class="lesopt" data-i="${i}" style="background:#fff;border:1.5px solid var(--line);border-radius:13px;padding:16px;font-weight:700;font-size:15px;transition:.15s;cursor:pointer;">${o}</button>`).join('')}
    </div>
    <div id="lesWhy" style="display:none;border-radius:12px;padding:14px 16px;margin-top:16px;font-size:14px;"></div>
    <div class="reader-foot" style="border:none;padding:0;margin-top:18px;display:none;" id="lesNext">
      <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="lesionIdx++;renderLesionCase();">${lesionIdx===LESION_CASES.length-1?'See results →':'Next patient →'}</button>
    </div>
   </div>`;
  document.querySelectorAll('.lesopt').forEach(b=>b.addEventListener('click',()=>{
    const i=+b.dataset.i,c2=LESION_CASES[lesionIdx];
    document.querySelectorAll('.lesopt').forEach(x=>x.style.pointerEvents='none');
    document.querySelector(`.lesopt[data-i="${c2.a}"]`).style.cssText+='border-color:var(--green);background:var(--green-soft);';
    const why=document.getElementById('lesWhy');
    if(i===c2.a){lesionScore++;why.style.background='var(--green-soft)';why.style.color='#3F7D5E';why.innerHTML='✓ '+c2.why;}
    else{b.style.cssText+='border-color:var(--coral);background:var(--coral-soft);';why.style.background='var(--coral-soft)';why.style.color='#B0614E';why.innerHTML='✗ '+c2.why;}
    why.style.display='block';document.getElementById('lesNext').style.display='flex';
  }));
}
function lesionDone(){
  const good=lesionScore>=5;
  document.getElementById('missionStage').innerHTML=`
   <div class="stage"><div class="stage-head"><div><div class="eyebrow" style="color:var(--green)">Mission complete</div><h2>Case files closed</h2></div></div>
    <div class="callout ${good?'key':'case'}"><div class="ct">${good?'🧠 Sharp diagnosis':'📌 Review the regions'}</div>
    <p style="font-size:16px;">You localised <b>${lesionScore}/${LESION_CASES.length}</b> cases correctly.${good?' Outstanding clinical reasoning.':' Revisit Lessons 2 and 3, then try again.'}</p></div>
    <div class="reader-foot" style="border:none;padding:8px 0 0;"><button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="missionLesion()">Replay cases</button></div>
   </div>`;
  if(good)completeMission('lesion','neuropsychologist',150);
  else toast('🧠','Cases logged','Localise 5+ correctly to earn the badge','');
}

function buildExamPool(){
  const pool=[];
  LESSONS.forEach(l=>l.quiz.forEach(q=>pool.push(q)));
  return pool.sort(()=>Math.random()-0.5).slice(0,12);
}
let examQs=[];
function renderExam(){
  examQs=buildExamPool();
  document.getElementById('examStage').innerHTML=`
    <div id="examList"></div>
    <div class="reader-foot" style="border:none;padding:0;">
      <button class="btn btn-primary" id="examSubmit">Submit exam</button>
      <span class="mono" style="font-size:12px;color:var(--ink-faint);">12 questions · pass at 70%</span>
    </div>
    <div id="examResult" style="margin-top:20px;"></div>`;
  document.getElementById('examList').innerHTML=examQs.map((q,qi)=>`
    <div class="panel" style="margin:0 0 14px;">
      <div style="font-family:var(--disp);font-weight:700;font-size:15.5px;margin-bottom:12px;">${qi+1}. ${q.q}</div>
      <div class="eopts" data-qi="${qi}">
        ${q.opts.map((o,oi)=>`<button class="eopt" data-oi="${oi}" style="display:block;width:100%;text-align:left;background:var(--paper);border:1.5px solid var(--line);border-radius:10px;padding:11px 14px;margin-bottom:8px;font-size:14px;transition:.15s;">${o}</button>`).join('')}
      </div>
    </div>`).join('');
  document.querySelectorAll('.eopts').forEach(grp=>grp.querySelectorAll('.eopt').forEach(btn=>btn.addEventListener('click',()=>{
    grp.querySelectorAll('.eopt').forEach(b=>{b.style.borderColor='var(--line)';b.style.background='var(--paper)';b.classList.remove('sel');});
    btn.classList.add('sel');btn.style.borderColor='var(--violet)';btn.style.background='var(--violet-soft)';
  })));
  document.getElementById('examSubmit').addEventListener('click',gradeExam);
}
function gradeExam(){
  let correct=0,answered=0;
  examQs.forEach((q,qi)=>{
    const grp=document.querySelector(`.eopts[data-qi="${qi}"]`);
    const sel=grp.querySelector('.eopt.sel');if(!sel)return;answered++;
    const oi=+sel.dataset.oi;
    grp.querySelectorAll('.eopt').forEach(b=>b.style.pointerEvents='none');
    grp.querySelector(`.eopt[data-oi="${q.a}"]`).style.cssText+='border-color:var(--green);background:var(--green-soft);';
    if(oi===q.a)correct++; else sel.style.cssText+='border-color:var(--coral);background:var(--coral-soft);';
  });
  if(answered<examQs.length){toast('🤔','Answer all 12 first','','');return;}
  const pct=Math.round(correct/examQs.length*100);
  const pass=pct>=70;
  const res=document.getElementById('examResult');
  res.innerHTML=`<div class="callout ${pass?'key':'case'}"><div class="ct">${pass?'🎓 Passed':'📌 Keep studying'}</div>
    <p style="font-size:16px;">You scored <b>${correct}/12 (${pct}%)</b>. ${pass?'You\'ve mastered Module 2.':'You need 70% to pass, review the lessons and retake.'}</p></div>
    <div class="reader-foot" style="border:none;padding:8px 0 0;"><button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="renderExam()">Retake exam</button></div>`;
  document.getElementById('examSubmit').disabled=true;document.getElementById('examSubmit').style.opacity='.5';
  if(pass){const isNew=!S.examPassed;if(isNew){S.examPassed=1;S.xp+=200;saveState();updateHUD();toast('⚡','Exam passed','Module 2 mastered','+200 XP');}unlockBadge('mastery');}
  res.scrollIntoView({behavior:'smooth',block:'center'});
}
</script>

<script>
/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   HERO NEURON ANIMATION (2D canvas)
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
(function(){
  const cv=document.getElementById('heroCanvas');if(!cv)return;
  const ctx=cv.getContext('2d');let w,h,dpr=Math.min(devicePixelRatio||1,2);
  function size(){w=cv.width=cv.offsetWidth*dpr;h=cv.height=cv.offsetHeight*dpr;}
  size();window.addEventListener('resize',size);
  const N=26,nodes=[];
  for(let i=0;i<N;i++)nodes.push({x:Math.random(),y:Math.random(),vx:(Math.random()-.5)*0.0004,vy:(Math.random()-.5)*0.0004,r:1.5+Math.random()*2.5});
  let pulses=[];
  function spawn(){const a=nodes[(Math.random()*N)|0],b=nodes[(Math.random()*N)|0];if(a!==b)pulses.push({a,b,t:0});}
  setInterval(spawn,420);
  function loop(){
    ctx.clearRect(0,0,w,h);
    nodes.forEach(n=>{n.x+=n.vx;n.y+=n.vy;if(n.x<0||n.x>1)n.vx*=-1;if(n.y<0||n.y>1)n.vy*=-1;});
    ctx.lineWidth=1*dpr;
    for(let i=0;i<N;i++)for(let j=i+1;j<N;j++){
      const a=nodes[i],b=nodes[j],dx=(a.x-b.x)*w,dy=(a.y-b.y)*h,d=Math.hypot(dx,dy);
      if(d<150*dpr){ctx.strokeStyle='rgba(150,130,255,'+(0.12*(1-d/(150*dpr)))+')';ctx.beginPath();ctx.moveTo(a.x*w,a.y*h);ctx.lineTo(b.x*w,b.y*h);ctx.stroke();}
    }
    nodes.forEach(n=>{ctx.fillStyle='rgba(190,175,255,.7)';ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(n.x*w,n.y*h,n.r*dpr,0,7);ctx.fill();});
    pulses=pulses.filter(p=>p.t<1);
    pulses.forEach(p=>{p.t+=0.02;const x=(p.a.x+(p.b.x-p.a.x)*p.t)*w,y=(p.a.y+(p.b.y-p.a.y)*p.t)*h;
      const g=ctx.createRadialGradient(x,y,0,x,y,9*dpr);g.addColorStop(0,'rgba(255,120,170,.95)');g.addColorStop(1,'rgba(255,120,170,0)');
      ctx.fillStyle=g;ctx.beginPath();ctx.arc(x,y,9*dpr,0,7);ctx.fill();});
    requestAnimationFrame(loop);
  }
  loop();
})();

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   3D WEBGL BRAIN  (embedded, reskinned, with mission tracking)
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
let brainInited=false;
const SD=[
  {id:'frontal',name:'Frontal Lobe',cat:'Cerebral Cortex',cc:'#E8A07F',col:[0.90,0.62,0.50],em:[0.04,0.03,0.02],pos:[0,1.0,1.85],sc:[2.65,1.65,1.45],op:0.72,bump:1,
   summ:'The largest lobe. Controls executive function, voluntary movement, personality, and language production.',
   fns:['Primary Motor Cortex controls voluntary muscle movements','Prefrontal Cortex manages planning, decision-making and impulse control',"Broca's Area controls speech production",'Regulates social behaviour and personality'],
   notes:"Phineas Gage survived a rod through his frontal lobe in 1848 but was permanently changed in personality. The prefrontal cortex is the last region to mature, around age 25.",
   rel:'ADHD, depression, schizophrenia, Broca aphasia, OCD, addiction.',topics:['Neuroanatomy','Motor Systems','Language']},
  {id:'parietal',name:'Parietal Lobe',cat:'Cerebral Cortex',cc:'#9FC7A0',col:[0.60,0.78,0.62],em:[0.03,0.04,0.03],pos:[0,2.2,0.05],sc:[2.4,1.2,1.85],op:0.72,bump:2,
   summ:'Sensory integration hub. Processes touch, pain, temperature and body position; manages spatial awareness.',
   fns:['Primary Somatosensory Cortex processes touch, pain and temperature','Somatosensory homunculus maps the body surface','Integrates vision and touch for action','Spatial attention and object localisation'],
   notes:"Right parietal lesions cause hemispatial neglect: patients ignore the entire left side of space, eating from only half a plate or drawing half a clock.",
   rel:'Hemispatial neglect, Gerstmann syndrome, dyslexia.',topics:['Sensory Systems','Spatial Cognition']},
  {id:'temporalL',name:'Temporal Lobe',cat:'Cerebral Cortex',cc:'#9FBCE0',col:[0.62,0.74,0.88],em:[0.03,0.03,0.04],pos:[-2.45,0.1,0.05],sc:[0.9,1.25,2.15],op:0.72,bump:3,
   summ:'Processes sound, understands language, recognises faces, and houses the hippocampus and amygdala.',
   fns:['Primary Auditory Cortex processes sound',"Wernicke's Area handles language comprehension",'Fusiform Gyrus recognises faces','Medial temporal lobe houses memory and emotion centres'],
   notes:"Wernicke's aphasia from left temporal damage produces fluent but nonsensical speech. The temporal lobe is the most common site of epileptic seizures.",
   rel:"Wernicke's aphasia, epilepsy, prosopagnosia, Alzheimer's.",topics:['Sensory Systems','Language','Memory']},
  {id:'temporalR',name:'Temporal Lobe (R)',cat:'Cerebral Cortex',cc:'#9FBCE0',col:[0.62,0.74,0.88],em:[0.03,0.03,0.04],pos:[2.45,0.1,0.05],sc:[0.9,1.25,2.15],op:0.72,bump:4,
   summ:'Non-verbal processing: music, facial expressions, prosody and visuospatial memory.',
   fns:['Face recognition (fusiform face area)','Music and prosody processing','Visuospatial memory','Reading emotional expressions'],
   notes:"The right temporal lobe is dominant for non-verbal processing and responds more strongly to music than the left.",
   rel:'Prosopagnosia, amusia, epilepsy, autism.',topics:['Sensory Systems','Social Neuroscience']},
  {id:'occipital',name:'Occipital Lobe',cat:'Cerebral Cortex',cc:'#B7A4E0',col:[0.72,0.64,0.88],em:[0.03,0.03,0.04],pos:[0,0.85,-2.1],sc:[2.15,1.45,1.1],op:0.72,bump:5,
   summ:'Dedicated entirely to visual processing, from raw light to object recognition and motion.',
   fns:['V1 receives raw visual signals','Dorsal "where/how" stream for location and action','Ventral "what" stream for identity','V4 colour, V5/MT motion'],
   notes:"Damage to V1 causes cortical blindness. Blindsight shows unconscious vision survives via subcortical pathways. In the blind, occipital cortex repurposes for touch.",
   rel:'Cortical blindness, achromatopsia, visual agnosia.',topics:['Sensory Systems','Perception']},
  {id:'cerebellum',name:'Cerebellum',cat:'Hindbrain',cc:'#E89A86',col:[0.93,0.60,0.52],em:[0.04,0.03,0.03],pos:[0,-1.35,-1.85],sc:[2.75,1.15,1.5],op:0.85,bump:6,
   summ:'Coordinates movement, balance and timing; plays roles in cognition and emotion.',
   fns:['Coordinates voluntary movement timing','Balance and posture','Motor learning into automatic skill','Roles in language timing and cognition'],
   notes:"Only ~10% of brain volume but ~80% of all neurons. It compares intended vs actual movement and corrects errors. Alcohol impairs it, ruining coordination.",
   rel:'Cerebellar ataxia, intention tremor, autism.',topics:['Motor Systems','Learning']},
  {id:'brainstem',name:'Brainstem',cat:'Brainstem',cc:'#99ADC9',col:[0.60,0.68,0.80],em:[0.03,0.03,0.04],pos:[0,-2.85,-0.1],sc:[0.68,1.65,0.68],op:0.9,bump:0,
   summ:"The brain's life-support system. Controls breathing, heart rate, consciousness and reflexes.",
   fns:['Medulla controls breathing and heart rate','Pons regulates REM sleep','Midbrain controls eye movement and dopamine','Reticular system regulates arousal'],
   notes:"All 12 cranial nerves originate here. The locus coeruleus is the brain's norepinephrine source. Brainstem death is the legal definition of death.",
   rel:"Parkinson's, locked-in syndrome, narcolepsy.",topics:['Neuroanatomy','Sleep','Consciousness']},
  {id:'thalamus',name:'Thalamus',cat:'Diencephalon',cc:'#B7A4E0',col:[0.72,0.62,0.86],em:[0.03,0.03,0.04],pos:[0,0.35,0.1],sc:[1.15,0.76,1.15],op:0.9,bump:0,
   summ:'Central relay station. Routes all senses except smell to the cortex and regulates consciousness.',
   fns:['Relays sensory signals to the cortex','Attentional gating','Generates brain rhythms and sleep spindles','Regulates consciousness'],
   notes:"Fatal familial insomnia destroys the thalamus; patients lose the ability to sleep and die within months. Anaesthetics disrupt thalamocortical connectivity.",
   rel:'Thalamic stroke, coma, fatal familial insomnia.',topics:['Sensory Systems','Consciousness']},
  {id:'hypothalamus',name:'Hypothalamus',cat:'Diencephalon',cc:'#E8A07F',col:[0.92,0.66,0.50],em:[0.04,0.03,0.02],pos:[0,-0.58,0.88],sc:[0.63,0.47,0.63],op:0.9,bump:0,
   summ:'Master regulator of homeostasis: hunger, thirst, temperature, hormones and sleep timing.',
   fns:['Hunger and satiety','Temperature regulation','Suprachiasmatic nucleus is the master circadian clock','Controls the pituitary and stress hormones'],
   notes:"At only 4 grams it regulates hunger, thirst, temperature, stress and sleep timing. It releases oxytocin, mediating social bonding and trust.",
   rel:'Obesity, Cushing syndrome, circadian disorders.',topics:['Homeostasis','Hormones']},
  {id:'basalL',name:'Basal Ganglia',cat:'Subcortical',cc:'#6E97C6',col:[0.55,0.72,0.86],em:[0.03,0.03,0.04],pos:[-1.05,0.2,0.5],sc:[0.75,0.9,0.72],op:0.88,bump:0,
   summ:'Controls action selection, movement initiation, habit formation and reward-based learning.',
   fns:['Striatum selects which movements to execute','Direct "Go" pathway','Indirect "No-Go" pathway','Nucleus accumbens is the reward centre'],
   notes:"Dopamine neurons fire when reward is better than expected, a prediction error that teaches the brain what to repeat. Drugs of abuse flood this system.",
   rel:"Parkinson's, Huntington's, Tourette, OCD, addiction.",topics:['Motor Systems','Reward','Dopamine']},
  {id:'basalR',name:'Basal Ganglia (R)',cat:'Subcortical',cc:'#6E97C6',col:[0.55,0.72,0.86],em:[0.03,0.03,0.04],pos:[1.05,0.2,0.5],sc:[0.75,0.9,0.72],op:0.88,bump:0,
   summ:'Bilateral motor and reward circuit: action selection, procedural learning and reward encoding.',
   fns:['Action selection','Procedural and habit learning','Reward prediction error signalling','Motivation generation'],
   notes:"The caudate handles goal-directed learning, the putamen handles habits. As a skill is learned, control shifts from caudate to putamen.",
   rel:"Parkinson's, Huntington's, OCD, addiction.",topics:['Motor Systems','Reward','Addiction']},
  {id:'hippL',name:'Hippocampus',cat:'Limbic System',cc:'#7FB089',col:[0.55,0.76,0.62],em:[0.03,0.04,0.03],pos:[-1.3,-0.1,-0.2],sc:[0.42,0.42,2.05],op:0.88,bump:0,
   summ:'Essential for forming new declarative memories and spatial navigation.',
   fns:['Memory consolidation during sleep','Spatial navigation via place cells','Contextual encoding','Adult neurogenesis in the dentate gyrus'],
   notes:"Henry Molaison had both hippocampi removed in 1953 and could not form a single new explicit memory for 55 years, yet could still learn motor skills.",
   rel:"Alzheimer's, PTSD, depression, epilepsy.",topics:['Memory','Neuroplasticity']},
  {id:'hippR',name:'Hippocampus (R)',cat:'Limbic System',cc:'#7FB089',col:[0.55,0.76,0.62],em:[0.03,0.04,0.03],pos:[1.3,-0.1,-0.2],sc:[0.42,0.42,2.05],op:0.88,bump:0,
   summ:'Spatial and episodic memory; visuospatial and autobiographical recall.',
   fns:['Spatial mapping of environments','Episodic autobiographical memory','Imagining future scenarios','Emotional memory with the amygdala'],
   notes:"Chronic stress raises cortisol, toxic to hippocampal neurons, explaining shrinkage in PTSD and depression. Exercise and antidepressants increase neurogenesis.",
   rel:"Alzheimer's, PTSD, depression.",topics:['Memory','Cognitive Neuroscience']},
  {id:'amygL',name:'Amygdala',cat:'Limbic System',cc:'#DD8468',col:[0.90,0.52,0.46],em:[0.05,0.03,0.03],pos:[-1.7,0.18,0.75],sc:[0.52,0.52,0.52],op:0.9,bump:0,
   summ:"The brain's alarm system. Detects threats, triggers fear, encodes emotional memories.",
   fns:['Fear conditioning','Emotional memory enhancement','Fight-or-flight initiation','Reads facial expressions in ~170 ms'],
   notes:"LeDoux found two fear pathways: a fast unconscious 'low road' (thalamus to amygdala) and a slower 'high road' through the cortex. Patient S.M. cannot feel fear.",
   rel:'Anxiety, phobias, PTSD, autism.',topics:['Emotion','Stress']},
  {id:'amygR',name:'Amygdala (R)',cat:'Limbic System',cc:'#DD8468',col:[0.90,0.52,0.46],em:[0.05,0.03,0.03],pos:[1.7,0.18,0.75],sc:[0.52,0.52,0.52],op:0.9,bump:0,
   summ:'Bilateral threat and emotion processor; right side is more sensitive to negative stimuli.',
   fns:['Automatic emotional appraisal under awareness','Sensitivity to negative and threat stimuli','Modulates heart rate and arousal','Strengthens emotional memories'],
   notes:"The amygdala responds to fearful faces shown for just 17 ms, below conscious perception, why anxiety is hard to think away.",
   rel:'Anxiety, PTSD, social anxiety, autism.',topics:['Emotion','Affective Neuroscience']},
  {id:'corpus',name:'Corpus Callosum',cat:'White Matter',cc:'#C2C9D6',col:[0.78,0.82,0.88],em:[0.03,0.03,0.04],pos:[0,1.15,0.1],sc:[3.1,0.22,0.82],op:0.75,bump:0,
   summ:'Over 200 million fibres linking the left and right hemispheres.',
   fns:['Interhemispheric communication','Coordinates two-handed movement','Enables hemispheric specialisation','Transfers learning between hemispheres'],
   notes:"Sperry's split-brain experiments showed each hemisphere has independent awareness. When information went only to the right hemisphere, patients could act but not name it.",
   rel:'Split-brain syndrome, alien hand syndrome, MS.',topics:['Brain Lateralisation']},
];
const brainViewed=new Set();

function initBrain(){
  if(brainInited)return; brainInited=true;
  const shell=document.getElementById('brainShell');
  shell.innerHTML=`
   <div style="width:100vw;margin-left:calc(50% - 50vw);">
     <div id="bp-view" style="position:relative;height:min(88vh,900px);overflow:hidden;background:radial-gradient(circle at 50% 28%,#FFFFFF 0%,#F4ECF4 68%,#ECE4EF 100%);border-top:1px solid var(--line);border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);">
       <canvas id="c" style="width:100%;height:100%;display:block;"></canvas>
       <div id="lbl" style="position:absolute;inset:0;pointer-events:none;overflow:hidden;"></div>
       <div style="position:absolute;top:14px;left:16px;display:flex;flex-direction:column;gap:5px;" id="bp-legend"></div>
       <div style="position:absolute;top:14px;right:16px;font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;letter-spacing:.1em;color:var(--ink-soft);text-align:right;">
         <div>MISSION · DISTRICTS EXPLORED</div><div style="font-size:18px;color:var(--ink);font-weight:700;" id="bp-count">0 / 5</div></div>
       <div id="hint" style="position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);text-align:center;pointer-events:none;color:var(--ink-faint);font-size:13px;">
         <span style="font-size:26px;display:block;margin-bottom:8px;opacity:.5;">&#9678;</span>Click any region to open its dossier</div>
       <div style="position:absolute;bottom:14px;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);display:flex;gap:10px;align-items:center;">
         <button id="xbtn" style="display:none;font-family:var(--body);font-weight:700;font-size:12px;padding:9px 18px;border-radius:22px;border:1.5px solid var(--line);background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);color:var(--ink);cursor:pointer;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);">Reassemble</button>
         <button id="explodebtn" style="font-family:var(--body);font-weight:700;font-size:12px;padding:9px 18px;border-radius:22px;border:1.5px solid var(--line);background:rgba(255,255,255,.92);color:var(--ink);cursor:pointer;box-shadow:var(--shadow-sm);">Explode all parts</button>
         <span style="font-family:var(--mono);font-size:10px;color:var(--ink-faint);">drag &middot; scroll &middot; click</span>
       </div>
       <div id="rpanel" style="position:absolute;top:0;right:0;width:330px;max-width:90%;height:100%;background:rgba(255,255,255,.98);border-left:1px solid var(--line);box-shadow:-12px 0 34px -16px rgba(50,74,109,.22);overflow-y:auto;transform:translateX(105%);transition:transform .3s cubic-bezier(.4,0,.2,1);">
         <button id="rpcls" style="position:sticky;top:10px;float:right;margin:10px;width:32px;height:32px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--paper2);border:1px solid var(--line);color:var(--ink);cursor:pointer;">&#10005;</button>
         <div id="rpbody" style="padding:16px 20px 30px;clear:both;color:var(--ink);"></div>
       </div>
     </div>
   </div>`;
  const LEG=[['#E8A07F','Cerebral Cortex'],['#DD8468','Limbic System'],['#B7A4E0','Diencephalon'],['#6E97C6','Subcortical'],['#E89A86','Hindbrain / Brainstem']];
  document.getElementById('bp-legend').innerHTML=LEG.map(l=>`<div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:7px;"><span style="width:9px;height:9px;border-radius:50%;background:${l[0]}"></span><span style="font-size:9.5px;color:var(--ink-soft);font-family:var(--mono);letter-spacing:.04em;">${l[1]}</span></div>`).join('');

  const canvas=document.getElementById('c');
  const gl=canvas.getContext('webgl',{antialias:true,alpha:false});
  if(!gl){document.getElementById('hint').textContent='WebGL is not supported in this browser.';return;}
  let W=canvas.width=canvas.offsetWidth*devicePixelRatio|0, H=canvas.height=canvas.offsetHeight*devicePixelRatio|0;
  const VS=`attribute vec3 aPos;attribute vec3 aNorm;uniform mat4 uMVP;uniform mat4 uModel;varying vec3 vN;varying vec3 vP;void main(){vec4 wp=uModel*vec4(aPos,1.0);vP=wp.xyz;mat3 nm=mat3(uModel[0].xyz,uModel[1].xyz,uModel[2].xyz);vN=normalize(nm*aNorm);gl_Position=uMVP*vec4(aPos,1.0);}`;
  const FS=`precision mediump float;uniform vec3 uColor;uniform float uAlpha;uniform vec3 uEm;varying vec3 vN;varying vec3 vP;void main(){vec3 N=normalize(vN);vec3 L1=normalize(vec3(5.0,10.0,9.0));vec3 L2=normalize(vec3(-8.0,-2.0,4.0));vec3 L3=normalize(vec3(2.0,-6.0,-9.0));float d1=max(dot(N,L1),0.0);float d2=max(dot(N,L2),0.0);float d3=max(dot(N,L3),0.0);vec3 amb=vec3(0.70,0.68,0.70)*0.72;vec3 sun=vec3(1.0,0.97,0.94)*1.15;vec3 fill=vec3(0.3,0.42,0.85)*0.45;vec3 back=vec3(1.0,0.62,0.5)*0.3;vec3 col=uColor*(amb+d1*sun+d2*fill+d3*back);vec3 V=normalize(-vP);float spec=pow(max(dot(reflect(-L1,N),V),0.0),40.0)*0.12;col+=spec+uEm;gl_FragColor=vec4(clamp(col,0.0,1.0),uAlpha);}`;
  function compile(t,s){const sh=gl.createShader(t);gl.shaderSource(sh,s);gl.compileShader(sh);return sh;}
  const prog=gl.createProgram();gl.attachShader(prog,compile(gl.VERTEX_SHADER,VS));gl.attachShader(prog,compile(gl.FRAGMENT_SHADER,FS));gl.linkProgram(prog);gl.useProgram(prog);
  const aPos=gl.getAttribLocation(prog,'aPos'),aNorm=gl.getAttribLocation(prog,'aNorm');
  const uMVP=gl.getUniformLocation(prog,'uMVP'),uModel=gl.getUniformLocation(prog,'uModel'),uColor=gl.getUniformLocation(prog,'uColor'),uAlpha=gl.getUniformLocation(prog,'uAlpha'),uEm=gl.getUniformLocation(prog,'uEm');
  gl.enable(gl.DEPTH_TEST);gl.enable(gl.BLEND);gl.blendFunc(gl.SRC_ALPHA,gl.ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA);gl.clearColor(0.996,0.973,0.949,1);
  const m4=()=>new Float32Array(16);
  function ident(o){o.fill(0);o[0]=o[5]=o[10]=o[15]=1;return o;}
  function mul(a,b){const o=m4();for(let c=0;c<4;c++)for(let r=0;r<4;r++){let s=0;for(let k=0;k<4;k++)s+=a[k*4+r]*b[c*4+k];o[c*4+r]=s;}return o;}
  function persp(fov,asp,n,f){const o=m4(),t=1/Math.tan(fov*.5),nf=1/(n-f);o[0]=t/asp;o[5]=t;o[10]=(f+n)*nf;o[11]=-1;o[14]=2*f*n*nf;return o;}
  function rotX(a){const o=m4(),c=Math.cos(a),s=Math.sin(a);ident(o);o[5]=c;o[6]=s;o[9]=-s;o[10]=c;return o;}
  function rotY(a){const o=m4(),c=Math.cos(a),s=Math.sin(a);ident(o);o[0]=c;o[2]=-s;o[8]=s;o[10]=c;return o;}
  function transl(x,y,z){const o=m4();ident(o);o[12]=x;o[13]=y;o[14]=z;return o;}
  function scaleM(x,y,z){const o=m4();o[0]=x;o[5]=y;o[10]=z;o[15]=1;return o;}
  function createBuf(t,d){const b=gl.createBuffer();gl.bindBuffer(t,b);gl.bufferData(t,d,gl.STATIC_DRAW);return b;}
  function makeSphere(rings,segs,bseed){
    const verts=[],norms=[],idx=[],s=bseed||0;
    for(let ri=0;ri<=rings;ri++){const phi=Math.PI*ri/rings,sp=Math.sin(phi),cp=Math.cos(phi);
      for(let si=0;si<=segs;si++){const th=2*Math.PI*si/segs,st=Math.sin(th),ct=Math.cos(th);const nx=sp*ct,ny=cp,nz=sp*st;let bump=0;
        if(s>0){bump=Math.sin(nx*7.2+s+1.1)*Math.cos(ny*5.8+s*1.3+0.6)*Math.sin(nz*6.5+s*.7+1.8)*.11+Math.cos(nx*4.1+s*2.1+2.3)*Math.sin(nz*4.6+s*1.7+0.9)*Math.cos(ny*3.9+s*.4+1.4)*.07+Math.sin(nx*11+s*3+ny*9)*Math.cos(nz*10+s*2+nx*8)*.025;}
        const r=1+bump;verts.push(nx*r,ny*r,nz*r);norms.push(nx,ny,nz);}}
    for(let ri=0;ri<rings;ri++)for(let si=0;si<segs;si++){const a=ri*(segs+1)+si,b=a+segs+1;idx.push(a,b,a+1,b,b+1,a+1);}
    return{vBuf:createBuf(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER,new Float32Array(verts)),nBuf:createBuf(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER,new Float32Array(norms)),iBuf:createBuf(gl.ELEMENT_ARRAY_BUFFER,new Uint16Array(idx)),count:idx.length};}
  const geoCache={};function getGeo(b){if(!geoCache[b])geoCache[b]=makeSphere(b>0?48:32,b>0?48:32,b);return geoCache[b];}
  let camZ=13,camZTarget=13;const projMat=persp(42*Math.PI/180,W/H,0.1,100);
  const regions=SD.map(s=>({...s,geo:getGeo(s.bump),cPos:[...s.pos],cOp:s.op,cScM:1,tPos:[...s.pos],tOp:s.op,tScM:1,pulse:0}));
  let gRY=0.3,gRX=-0.12,tRY=0.3,tRX=-0.12,autoRot=true,isDown=false,prevMX=0,prevMY=0,downX=0,downY=0;
  let appState='ASSEMBLED',selectedRegion=null,exploded=false,frameT=0;

  function drawRegion(reg,viewRotMat){
    if(reg.cOp<0.01)return;const geo=reg.geo;const[px,py,pz]=reg.cPos;const[sx,sy,sz]=reg.sc;const sm=reg.cScM;
    const model=mul(viewRotMat,mul(transl(px,py,pz),scaleM(sx*sm,sy*sm,sz*sm)));
    const mvp=mul(projMat,mul(transl(0,0,-camZ),model));
    gl.uniformMatrix4fv(uMVP,false,mvp);gl.uniformMatrix4fv(uModel,false,model);
    gl.uniform3fv(uColor,reg.col);gl.uniform1f(uAlpha,reg.cOp);
    const em=selectedRegion===reg?[reg.em[0]+reg.pulse*0.35,reg.em[1]+reg.pulse*0.35,reg.em[2]+reg.pulse*0.5]:reg.em;
    gl.uniform3fv(uEm,em);
    gl.bindBuffer(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER,geo.vBuf);gl.enableVertexAttribArray(aPos);gl.vertexAttribPointer(aPos,3,gl.FLOAT,false,0,0);
    gl.bindBuffer(gl.ARRAY_BUFFER,geo.nBuf);gl.enableVertexAttribArray(aNorm);gl.vertexAttribPointer(aNorm,3,gl.FLOAT,false,0,0);
    gl.bindBuffer(gl.ELEMENT_ARRAY_BUFFER,geo.iBuf);gl.drawElements(gl.TRIANGLES,geo.count,gl.UNSIGNED_SHORT,0);
  }
  function transformZ(pos){const[x,y,z]=pos;const cosY=Math.cos(gRY),sinY=Math.sin(gRY),cosX=Math.cos(gRX),sinX=Math.sin(gRX);const p1y=y,p1z=-x*sinY+z*cosY;return p1y*sinX+p1z*cosX;}
  function render(){
    requestAnimationFrame(render);frameT+=0.008;camZ+=(camZTarget-camZ)*0.07;
    if(autoRot&&!isDown&&appState==='ASSEMBLED')tRY+=0.0025;
    gRY+=(tRY-gRY)*0.08;gRX+=(tRX-gRX)*0.08;
    regions.forEach(r=>{for(let i=0;i<3;i++)r.cPos[i]+=(r.tPos[i]-r.cPos[i])*0.07;r.cOp+=(r.tOp-r.cOp)*0.09;r.cScM+=(r.tScM-r.cScM)*0.07;r.pulse=(r===selectedRegion)?0.5+Math.sin(frameT*2.8)*0.5:0;});
    const viewRotMat=mul(rotX(gRX),rotY(gRY));
    const sorted=[...regions].sort((a,b)=>transformZ(a.cPos)-transformZ(b.cPos));
    gl.viewport(0,0,W,H);gl.clear(gl.COLOR_BUFFER_BIT|gl.DEPTH_BUFFER_BIT);gl.depthMask(false);
    sorted.forEach(r=>drawRegion(r,viewRotMat));gl.depthMask(true);updateLabels();
  }
  const SHOW_LBL=['frontal','parietal','temporalL','occipital','cerebellum','brainstem','thalamus','hypothalamus','basalL','hippL','amygL','corpus'];
  const lblDiv=document.getElementById('lbl');
  function updateLabels(){
    lblDiv.innerHTML='';const rOpen=document.getElementById('rpanel').style.transform==='translateX(0px)';
    const rect=canvas.getBoundingClientRect();const pw=rect.width,ph=rect.height;
    const maxX=rOpen?pw-335:pw-12;const fov=42*Math.PI/180,f=1/Math.tan(fov*0.5);
    regions.forEach(r=>{
      if(!SHOW_LBL.includes(r.id)||r.cOp<0.1)return;const[x,y,z]=r.cPos;
      const cosY=Math.cos(gRY),sinY=Math.sin(gRY),cosX=Math.cos(gRX),sinX=Math.sin(gRX);
      const p1x=x*cosY+z*sinY,p1y=y,p1z=-x*sinY+z*cosY;const wx=p1x,wy=p1y*cosX-p1z*sinX,wz=p1y*sinX+p1z*cosX;
      const vz=wz-camZ;if(vz>=0)return;const ndcX=wx*f/(pw/ph)/(-vz),ndcY=wy*f/(-vz);
      const sx=(ndcX+1)/2*pw,sy=(-ndcY+1)/2*ph;if(sx<10||sx>maxX||sy<18||sy>ph-18)return;
      const isSel=r===selectedRegion,hex=r.cc;const el=document.createElement('div');el.textContent=r.name.replace(' (R)','');
      el.style.cssText=`position:absolute;left:${sx}px;top:${sy}px;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);font-size:9.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.08em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#324A6D;text-shadow:0 0 6px rgba(255,255,255,.95),0 1px 2px rgba(255,255,255,.85);white-space:nowrap;pointer-events:none;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;`;
      lblDiv.appendChild(el);
    });
  }
  function pickRegion(ex,ey){
    const rect=canvas.getBoundingClientRect();const ndcX=((ex-rect.left)/rect.width)*2-1,ndcY=-(((ey-rect.top)/rect.height)*2-1);
    const fov=42*Math.PI/180,f=1/Math.tan(fov*0.5),asp=W/H;const rdx=ndcX*asp/f,rdy=ndcY/f,rdz=-1;
    const rLen=Math.sqrt(rdx*rdx+rdy*rdy+rdz*rdz);const ray=[rdx/rLen,rdy/rLen,rdz/rLen];
    let minT=Infinity,hit=null;
    regions.forEach(r=>{
      if(r.cOp<0.1)return;const[px,py,pz]=r.cPos;const cosY=Math.cos(gRY),sinY=Math.sin(gRY),cosX=Math.cos(gRX),sinX=Math.sin(gRX);
      const p1x=px*cosY+pz*sinY,p1y=py,p1z=-px*sinY+pz*cosY;const cx=p1x,cy=p1y*cosX-p1z*sinX,cz=p1y*sinX+p1z*cosX-camZ;
      const[sx,sy,sz]=r.sc;const avgSc=(sx+sy+sz)/3*r.cScM;const ocx=-cx,ocy=-cy,ocz=-cz;
      const b2=ray[0]*ocx+ray[1]*ocy+ray[2]*ocz;const c=ocx*ocx+ocy*ocy+ocz*ocz-avgSc*avgSc;const disc=b2*b2-c;
      if(disc<0)return;const t=-b2-Math.sqrt(disc);if(t>0.01&&t<minT){minT=t;hit=r;}
    });
    return hit;
  }
  canvas.addEventListener('pointerdown',e=>{isDown=true;autoRot=false;downX=prevMX=e.clientX;downY=prevMY=e.clientY;});
  canvas.addEventListener('pointermove',e=>{if(!isDown)return;tRY+=(e.clientX-prevMX)*0.008;tRX=Math.max(-0.6,Math.min(0.6,tRX+(e.clientY-prevMY)*0.008));prevMX=e.clientX;prevMY=e.clientY;});
  canvas.addEventListener('pointerup',e=>{isDown=false;if(Math.abs(e.clientX-downX)<5&&Math.abs(e.clientY-downY)<5)onClick(e);});
  canvas.addEventListener('wheel',e=>{camZTarget=Math.max(5,Math.min(20,camZTarget+e.deltaY*0.025));},{passive:true});
  canvas.addEventListener('touchstart',e=>{const t=e.touches[0];isDown=true;autoRot=false;downX=prevMX=t.clientX;downY=prevMY=t.clientY;},{passive:true});
  canvas.addEventListener('touchmove',e=>{if(!isDown||!e.touches[0])return;const t=e.touches[0];tRY+=(t.clientX-prevMX)*0.008;tRX=Math.max(-0.6,Math.min(0.6,tRX+(t.clientY-prevMY)*0.008));prevMX=t.clientX;prevMY=t.clientY;e.preventDefault();},{passive:false});
  canvas.addEventListener('touchend',e=>{isDown=false;if(e.changedTouches[0]){const t=e.changedTouches[0];if(Math.abs(t.clientX-downX)<8&&Math.abs(t.clientY-downY)<8)onClick(t);}},{passive:true});

  function onClick(e){const hit=pickRegion(e.clientX,e.clientY);if(hit)enterSelected(hit);}
  function trackView(reg){
    const base=reg.id.replace(/R$/,'').replace(/L$/,'');
    brainViewed.add(base);
    const n=Math.min(brainViewed.size,5);
    const cEl=document.getElementById('bp-count');if(cEl)cEl.textContent=n+' / 5';
    if(brainViewed.size>=5)completeMission('explorer','district_explorer',120);
  }
  function enterSelected(reg){
    if(appState==='EXPLODED')exitExplode(false);
    appState='SELECTED';selectedRegion=reg;tRY=0;tRX=-0.12;
    regions.forEach(r=>{if(r===reg){r.tPos=[-2.0,0.0,2.5];r.tOp=r.op;r.tScM=1.3;}else{r.tPos=[...r.pos];r.tOp=0;r.tScM=1;}});
    camZTarget=11;showPanel(reg);
    const xb=document.getElementById('xbtn');xb.style.display='inline-block';xb.textContent='Reassemble';
    document.getElementById('hint').style.opacity='0';
    trackView(reg);
  }
  function exitSelected(){
    if(!selectedRegion)return;selectedRegion=null;appState='ASSEMBLED';
    regions.forEach(r=>{r.tPos=[...r.pos];r.tOp=r.op;r.tScM=1;});
    camZTarget=13;tRY=0.3;tRX=-0.12;closePanel();
    document.getElementById('xbtn').style.display='none';setTimeout(()=>{autoRot=true;},1200);
  }
  function toggleExplode(){
    if(appState==='SELECTED')exitSelected();
    if(!exploded){exploded=true;appState='EXPLODED';autoRot=false;tRY=0;tRX=-0.12;
      regions.forEach(r=>{const[ox,oy,oz]=r.pos;const len=Math.sqrt(ox*ox+oy*oy+oz*oz)||1;const push=Math.min(len*0.9+1.6,4.5);
        const nx=ox/len*push,ny=oy/len*push,nz=oz/len*push;r.tPos=[nx,Math.max(-4.0,Math.min(4.0,ny)),nz];r.tOp=r.op;r.tScM=1;});
      camZTarget=16;const xb=document.getElementById('xbtn');xb.style.display='inline-block';xb.textContent='Reassemble';
      document.getElementById('explodebtn').textContent='Reassemble parts';document.getElementById('hint').style.opacity='0';
    }else exitExplode(true);
  }
  function exitExplode(resetAuto){
    exploded=false;appState='ASSEMBLED';regions.forEach(r=>{r.tPos=[...r.pos];r.tOp=r.op;r.tScM=1;});
    camZTarget=13;tRY=0.3;tRX=-0.12;document.getElementById('xbtn').style.display='none';
    document.getElementById('explodebtn').textContent='Explode all parts';closePanel();if(resetAuto)setTimeout(()=>{autoRot=true;},1500);
  }
  function exitAction(){if(appState==='EXPLODED')exitExplode(true);else exitSelected();}
  function showPanel(reg){
    const hex=reg.cc;
    const fns=reg.fns.map(f=>`<div style="background:var(--paper2);border-radius:8px;padding:9px 12px;border-left:3px solid ${hex};font-size:12.5px;line-height:1.55;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-bottom:6px;">${f}</div>`).join('');
    const chips=reg.topics.map(t=>`<span style="font-size:10px;font-weight:700;padding:3px 10px;border-radius:12px;background:var(--violet-soft);border:1px solid var(--violet);color:var(--violet);margin:3px 3px 0 0;display:inline-block;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;">${t}</span>`).join('');
    document.getElementById('rpbody').innerHTML=`
      <div style="height:5px;border-radius:3px;background:${hex};margin-bottom:14px;"></div>
      <div style="font-size:9.5px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:${hex};margin-bottom:8px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;">${reg.cat}</div>
      <div style="font-family:'Cormorant Garamond',Georgia,serif;font-size:27px;font-weight:700;color:var(--ink);line-height:1.1;margin-bottom:10px;">${reg.name}</div>
      <div style="font-size:13.5px;line-height:1.7;color:var(--ink-soft);margin-bottom:16px;padding-bottom:16px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--line);">${reg.summ}</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:${hex};margin-bottom:9px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;">Key functions</div>${fns}
      <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--teal);margin:16px 0 8px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;">Neuroscience note</div>
      <div style="background:var(--teal-soft);border:1px solid var(--teal);border-radius:9px;padding:12px 14px;font-size:12.5px;line-height:1.7;color:var(--ink-soft);">${reg.notes}</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--coral);margin:16px 0 8px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;">Clinical relevance</div>
      <div style="background:var(--coral-soft);border:1px solid var(--coral);border-radius:9px;padding:12px 14px;font-size:12.5px;line-height:1.7;color:var(--ink-soft);">${reg.rel}</div>
      <div style="font-size:9px;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--violet);margin:16px 0 6px;font-family:'Space Mono',monospace;">Course topics</div><div>${chips}</div>`;
    document.getElementById('rpanel').style.transform='translateX(0px)';
  }
  function closePanel(){document.getElementById('rpanel').style.transform='translateX(105%)';}
  document.getElementById('rpcls').addEventListener('click',()=>{closePanel();exitSelected();});
  document.getElementById('xbtn').addEventListener('click',exitAction);
  document.getElementById('explodebtn').addEventListener('click',toggleExplode);
  function doResize(){W=canvas.width=canvas.offsetWidth*devicePixelRatio|0;H=canvas.height=canvas.offsetHeight*devicePixelRatio|0;gl.viewport(0,0,W,H);const p=persp(42*Math.PI/180,W/H,0.1,100);projMat.set(p);}
  window.addEventListener('resize',doResize);
  doResize();render();
}

/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   BOOT
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
function boot(){
  updateHUD();
  renderLessons();
  renderMissionGrid();
  renderQuests('questRow');
  renderPathway('pathSvg','questRow');
  renderBadgeShelf();
  window.addEventListener('resize',()=>{renderPathway('pathSvg','questRow');if(document.getElementById('v-quests').classList.contains('on'))renderPathway('pathSvg2','questRow2');renderPathway('pathSvg3','questRow3',QUESTS3);});
}
boot();


/* ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════
   ACCOUNTS · CLOUD SYNC · PROFILES · SESSION
   ════════════════════════════════════════════════════════ */
let currentProfile=null;       // { id, username, display_name, avatar_emoji, bio }
let authTab='signin';
let unameCheckTimer=null;

const AVATAR_CHOICES=['🧠','🔬','⚡','🦉','🌱','🧬','💡','🎯','🌟','🔭','📚','🧩'];

/* ---------- Modal (quick popup, still used for first-visit nudge) ---------- */
function openAuthModal(){
  /* Route to the full login page instead of a cramped modal */
  const m=document.getElementById('authModal');
  if(m)m.classList.remove('on');
  go('login');
}
function closeAuthModal(){
  const m=document.getElementById('authModal');
  if(m)m.classList.remove('on');
  try{localStorage.setItem('nq_auth_prompted','1');}catch(e){}
}

/* ---------- Login page ---------- */
function switchAuthTab(tab){
  authTab=tab;
  document.getElementById('tabSignin').classList.toggle('active',tab==='signin');
  document.getElementById('tabSignup').classList.toggle('active',tab==='signup');
  document.getElementById('loginTitle').textContent = tab==='signin' ? 'Welcome back' : 'Create your account';
  document.getElementById('loginSub').textContent = tab==='signin'
    ? 'Sign in to sync your progress across devices.'
    : 'Join Humanly — free forever. Your XP, badges and streaks follow you everywhere.';
  document.getElementById('googleBtnLabel').textContent = tab==='signin' ? 'Sign in with Google' : 'Sign up with Google';
  document.getElementById('loginMagicBtn').textContent = tab==='signin' ? 'Email me a magic link' : 'Sign up with email';
}
function renderLogin(){
  try{localStorage.setItem('nq_auth_prompted','1');}catch(e){}
  const msg=document.getElementById('loginMsg');
  if(msg){msg.textContent='';msg.className='auth-msg';}
  /* If already signed in, bounce to profile */
  if(currentUser){go('profile');}
}

async function sendMagicLink(){
  const email=(document.getElementById('loginEmail')||{}).value?.trim()
            || (document.getElementById('authEmail')||{}).value?.trim() || '';
  const msg=document.getElementById('loginMsg')||document.getElementById('authMsg');
  if(!sb){if(msg){msg.textContent='Account service is offline right now.';msg.className='auth-msg error';}return;}
  if(!email||!email.includes('@')){if(msg){msg.textContent='Please enter a valid email.';msg.className='auth-msg error';}return;}
  if(msg){msg.textContent='Sending…';msg.className='auth-msg';}
  try{
    const {error}=await sb.auth.signInWithOtp({email,options:{emailRedirectTo:window.location.href}});
    if(error){if(msg){msg.textContent=error.message;msg.className='auth-msg error';}}
    else{if(msg){msg.textContent='Check your email for a magic link!';msg.className='auth-msg success';}}
  }catch(e){
    if(msg){msg.textContent='Could not reach the account service. If you opened this file directly, it needs to be hosted online to sign in.';msg.className='auth-msg error';}
  }
}

async function signInWithGoogle(){
  const msg=document.getElementById('loginMsg')||document.getElementById('authMsg');
  if(!sb){if(msg){msg.textContent='Account service is offline right now.';msg.className='auth-msg error';}return;}
  try{
    const {error}=await sb.auth.signInWithOAuth({provider:'google',options:{redirectTo:window.location.href}});
    if(error && msg){msg.textContent=error.message;msg.className='auth-msg error';}
  }catch(e){
    if(msg){msg.textContent='Could not start Google sign-in. Make sure the Google provider is enabled in Supabase and this URL is on the redirect list.';msg.className='auth-msg error';}
  }
}

async function signOutUser(){
  if(sb)await sb.auth.signOut();
  currentUser=null;currentProfile=null;
  updateAuthUI();
  go('home');
}

/* ---------- Profile loading / saving ---------- */
async function loadProfile(){
  if(!sb||!currentUser){currentProfile=null;return;}
  try{
    const {data,error}=await sb.from('profiles').select('*').eq('id',currentUser.id).maybeSingle();
    if(error)throw error;
    currentProfile=data||{id:currentUser.id,username:null,display_name:(currentUser.email||'Explorer').split('@')[0],avatar_emoji:'🧠',bio:null};
  }catch(e){
    console.warn('Profile load failed:',e.message||e);
    currentProfile={id:currentUser.id,username:null,display_name:(currentUser.email||'Explorer').split('@')[0],avatar_emoji:'🧠',bio:null};
  }
}

async function saveProfile(patch){
  if(!sb||!currentUser)return{error:'not signed in'};
  const row=Object.assign({id:currentUser.id,updated_at:new Date().toISOString()},patch);
  const {error}=await sb.from('profiles').upsert(row);
  if(!error){currentProfile=Object.assign(currentProfile||{},patch);}
  return{error};
}

/* ---------- Header button ---------- */
function updateAuthUI(){
  const btn=document.getElementById('acctBtn');
  if(!btn)return;
  if(currentUser){
    const name=(currentProfile&&(currentProfile.username||currentProfile.display_name))||(currentUser.email||'Account').split('@')[0];
    btn.textContent=name;
    btn.classList.add('signed-in');
    btn.setAttribute('onclick',"go('profile')");
  }else{
    btn.textContent='Sign in';
    btn.classList.remove('signed-in');
    btn.setAttribute('onclick',"go('login')");
  }
}

/* ---------- Profile page ---------- */
function renderProfile(){
  const body=document.getElementById('profileBody');
  if(!body)return;

  if(!currentUser){
    body.innerHTML=`
      <div class="sec-head">
        <div class="eyebrow">Your profile</div>
        <h2>Sign in to build your profile</h2>
        <p>Create a free account to pick a username, choose an avatar, and keep your XP, badges and streaks synced across every device.</p>
      </div>
      <div style="text-align:center;margin-top:8px;">
        <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="go('login')">Sign in / Create account →</button>
      </div>`;
    return;
  }

  /* Needs a username? Show onboarding first. */
  if(currentProfile && !currentProfile.username){
    renderUsernameOnboarding(body);
    return;
  }

  const p=currentProfile||{};
  const rank=rankFor(S.xp);
  const badgeCount=Object.values(S.badges||{}).filter(Boolean).length;
  const lessonCount=Object.values(S.lessons||{}).filter(Boolean).length;

  body.innerHTML=`
    <div class="profile-hero">
      <div class="profile-avatar">${p.avatar_emoji||'🧠'}</div>
      <div class="profile-name">${escapeHtml(p.display_name||'Explorer')}</div>
      <div class="profile-uname">@${escapeHtml(p.username||'')}</div>
      ${p.bio?`<div class="profile-bio">${escapeHtml(p.bio)}</div>`:''}
    </div>

    <div class="profile-stats">
      <div class="pstat"><div class="n">${S.xp||0}</div><div class="l">XP</div></div>
      <div class="pstat"><div class="n">${S.streak||0}</div><div class="l">Day streak</div></div>
      <div class="pstat"><div class="n">${lessonCount}</div><div class="l">Lessons</div></div>
      <div class="pstat"><div class="n">${badgeCount}</div><div class="l">Badges</div></div>
    </div>

    <div class="sec-head" style="text-align:left;margin-bottom:16px;">
      <div class="eyebrow">Rank</div>
      <h2 style="font-size:24px;">${escapeHtml(rank.name)}</h2>
    </div>

    <div style="display:flex;gap:12px;flex-wrap:wrap;">
      <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="openProfileEditor()">Edit profile</button>
      <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="go('progress')">View full progress →</button>
      <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="signOutUser()">Sign out</button>
    </div>`;
}

function renderUsernameOnboarding(body){
  body.innerHTML=`
    <div class="auth-page" style="min-height:auto;">
      <div class="auth-card">
        <h2 style="text-align:center;">Pick your username</h2>
        <p class="sub">This is how you'll appear on Humanly. You can change it later.</p>
        <div class="auth-field">
          <label for="onbUsername">Username</label>
          <div class="uname-wrap">
            <input type="text" id="onbUsername" class="auth-input" placeholder="brain_explorer" autocomplete="off" maxlength="20" oninput="checkUsername(this.value)" />
            <span class="uname-status" id="unameStatus"></span>
          </div>
          <div class="uname-hint">3–20 characters · letters, numbers and underscores</div>
        </div>
        <div class="auth-field">
          <label>Choose an avatar</label>
          <div class="emoji-picker" id="onbEmoji">
            ${AVATAR_CHOICES.map((e,i)=>`<button type="button" class="emoji-opt${i===0?' sel':''}" onclick="pickOnbEmoji(this,'${e}')">${e}</button>`).join('')}
          </div>
        </div>
        <button class="btn btn-primary" style="width:100%;justify-content:center;margin-top:8px;" id="onbSave" onclick="saveUsername()">Save & continue</button>
        <p id="onbMsg" class="auth-msg" style="text-align:center;"></p>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  body._onbEmoji='🧠';
}
let _onbEmoji='🧠';
function pickOnbEmoji(btn,emoji){
  document.querySelectorAll('#onbEmoji .emoji-opt').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('sel'));
  btn.classList.add('sel');
  _onbEmoji=emoji;
}

function validUsernameFormat(u){return /^[a-zA-Z0-9_]{3,20}$/.test(u);}

function checkUsername(val){
  const status=document.getElementById('unameStatus');
  const u=val.trim();
  clearTimeout(unameCheckTimer);
  if(!u){status.textContent='';status.className='uname-status';return;}
  if(!validUsernameFormat(u)){status.textContent='invalid';status.className='uname-status bad';return;}
  status.textContent='checking…';status.className='uname-status checking';
  unameCheckTimer=setTimeout(async()=>{
    if(!sb){status.textContent='';return;}
    try{
      const {data,error}=await sb.rpc('username_available',{check_name:u});
      if(error)throw error;
      if(data){status.textContent='available ✓';status.className='uname-status ok';}
      else{status.textContent='taken';status.className='uname-status bad';}
    }catch(e){status.textContent='';status.className='uname-status';}
  },400);
}

async function saveUsername(){
  const input=document.getElementById('onbUsername');
  const msg=document.getElementById('onbMsg');
  const u=input.value.trim();
  if(!validUsernameFormat(u)){msg.textContent='Username must be 3–20 letters, numbers or underscores.';msg.className='auth-msg error';return;}
  msg.textContent='Saving…';msg.className='auth-msg';
  /* Final availability check */
  try{
    const {data:avail}=await sb.rpc('username_available',{check_name:u});
    if(!avail){msg.textContent='That username is taken — try another.';msg.className='auth-msg error';return;}
  }catch(e){}
  const dname=currentProfile?.display_name||(currentUser.email||'Explorer').split('@')[0];
  const {error}=await saveProfile({username:u,avatar_emoji:_onbEmoji,display_name:dname});
  if(error){msg.textContent=(error.message||'Could not save.')+'';msg.className='auth-msg error';return;}
  updateAuthUI();
  renderProfile();
}

/* ---------- Profile editor ---------- */
function openProfileEditor(){
  const body=document.getElementById('profileBody');
  const p=currentProfile||{};
  body.innerHTML=`
    <div class="auth-page" style="min-height:auto;">
      <div class="auth-card">
        <h2 style="text-align:center;">Edit profile</h2>
        <p class="sub">Update how you appear on Humanly.</p>
        <div class="auth-field">
          <label for="edUsername">Username</label>
          <div class="uname-wrap">
            <input type="text" id="edUsername" class="auth-input" value="${escapeHtml(p.username||'')}" maxlength="20" oninput="checkEditUsername(this.value)" />
            <span class="uname-status" id="edUnameStatus"></span>
          </div>
          <div class="uname-hint">3–20 characters · letters, numbers and underscores</div>
        </div>
        <div class="auth-field">
          <label for="edDisplay">Display name</label>
          <input type="text" id="edDisplay" class="auth-input" value="${escapeHtml(p.display_name||'')}" maxlength="40" />
        </div>
        <div class="auth-field">
          <label for="edBio">Bio</label>
          <input type="text" id="edBio" class="auth-input" value="${escapeHtml(p.bio||'')}" maxlength="140" placeholder="A curious mind exploring the brain…" />
        </div>
        <div class="auth-field">
          <label>Avatar</label>
          <div class="emoji-picker" id="edEmoji">
            ${AVATAR_CHOICES.map(e=>`<button type="button" class="emoji-opt${e===(p.avatar_emoji||'🧠')?' sel':''}" onclick="pickEditEmoji(this,'${e}')">${e}</button>`).join('')}
          </div>
        </div>
        <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;margin-top:8px;">
          <button class="btn btn-primary" style="flex:1;justify-content:center;" onclick="saveProfileEdits()">Save changes</button>
          <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="renderProfile()">Cancel</button>
        </div>
        <p id="edMsg" class="auth-msg" style="text-align:center;"></p>
      </div>
    </div>`;
  _editEmoji=p.avatar_emoji||'🧠';
}
let _editEmoji='🧠';
function pickEditEmoji(btn,emoji){
  document.querySelectorAll('#edEmoji .emoji-opt').forEach(b=>b.classList.remove('sel'));
  btn.classList.add('sel');
  _editEmoji=emoji;
}
function checkEditUsername(val){
  const status=document.getElementById('edUnameStatus');
  const u=val.trim();
  clearTimeout(unameCheckTimer);
  if(!u){status.textContent='';status.className='uname-status';return;}
  if(u.toLowerCase()===(currentProfile?.username||'').toLowerCase()){status.textContent='current';status.className='uname-status';return;}
  if(!validUsernameFormat(u)){status.textContent='invalid';status.className='uname-status bad';return;}
  status.textContent='checking…';status.className='uname-status checking';
  unameCheckTimer=setTimeout(async()=>{
    if(!sb){status.textContent='';return;}
    try{
      const {data}=await sb.rpc('username_available',{check_name:u});
      status.textContent=data?'available ✓':'taken';
      status.className='uname-status '+(data?'ok':'bad');
    }catch(e){status.textContent='';status.className='uname-status';}
  },400);
}
async function saveProfileEdits(){
  const u=document.getElementById('edUsername').value.trim();
  const dn=document.getElementById('edDisplay').value.trim();
  const bio=document.getElementById('edBio').value.trim();
  const msg=document.getElementById('edMsg');
  if(!validUsernameFormat(u)){msg.textContent='Username must be 3–20 letters, numbers or underscores.';msg.className='auth-msg error';return;}
  msg.textContent='Saving…';msg.className='auth-msg';
  /* If username changed, verify availability */
  if(u.toLowerCase()!==(currentProfile?.username||'').toLowerCase()){
    try{
      const {data:avail}=await sb.rpc('username_available',{check_name:u});
      if(!avail){msg.textContent='That username is taken — try another.';msg.className='auth-msg error';return;}
    }catch(e){}
  }
  const {error}=await saveProfile({username:u,display_name:dn||u,bio:bio||null,avatar_emoji:_editEmoji});
  if(error){msg.textContent=(error.message||'Could not save.');msg.className='auth-msg error';return;}
  updateAuthUI();
  renderProfile();
}

/* ---------- small helpers ---------- */
function escapeHtml(s){return String(s==null?'':s).replace(/[&<>"']/g,c=>({'&':'&amp;','<':'&lt;','>':'&gt;','"':'&quot;',"'":'&#39;'}[c]));}

/* ---------- Session init ---------- */
(async function initAuth(){
  if(!sb){console.warn('Supabase SDK not loaded — running in local-only mode.');updateAuthUI();return;}
  try{
    const {data:{session}}=await sb.auth.getSession();
    currentUser=session?session.user:null;
    if(currentUser){await loadProfile();await loadCloud();}
    updateAuthUI();
    sb.auth.onAuthStateChange(async(event,session)=>{
      currentUser=session?session.user:null;
      if(currentUser){await loadProfile();await loadCloud();}
      else{currentProfile=null;}
      updateAuthUI();
      if(event==='SIGNED_IN'){
        closeAuthModal();
        /* New user with no username → onboarding, else profile */
        go('profile');
      }
    });
  }catch(e){console.warn('Auth init failed:',e.message||e);updateAuthUI();}
  /* First-visit nudge → route to full login page once */
  try{
    if(!currentUser && !localStorage.getItem('nq_auth_prompted')){
      setTimeout(()=>{ if(!currentUser){ go('login'); } },1400);
    }
  }catch(e){}
})();
</script>

<div id="badgePop"><div class="badge-modal">
  <div class="badge-big" id="bpIcon">🏅</div>
  <div class="eyebrow">Badge unlocked</div>
  <h3 id="bpName">Badge</h3>
  <p id="bpDesc">Nice work.</p>
  <button class="btn btn-primary" onclick="document.getElementById('badgePop').classList.remove('on')">Keep going</button>
</div></div>

<div id="resetConfirm"><div class="badge-modal">
  <div class="badge-big">🔄</div>
  <div class="eyebrow" style="color:var(--coral);">Start over</div>
  <h3>Reset all progress?</h3>
  <p>This clears your XP, badges, streaks and lesson history. This cannot be undone.</p>
  <div style="display:flex;gap:10px;justify-content:center;">
    <button class="btn btn-ghost" onclick="document.getElementById('resetConfirm').classList.remove('on')">Cancel</button>
    <button class="btn btn-primary" id="resetConfirmBtn" style="background:var(--coral);" onclick="doResetProgress()">Yes, reset everything</button>
  </div>
</div></div>

</body>
</html>
